name: Chicken Saltimbocca with Prosciutto & Sage
description: A classic Italian dish featuring pan-seared chicken cutlets topped with prosciutto and fresh sage, typically finished with a pan sauce.
preparationNotes: Pan-seared with prosciutto and fresh sage.
customerGuidance: A classic Italian dish that's perfect for protein-focused diners.

name: Chicken Florentine with Spinach & White Wine Cream Sauce
description: A classic Italian-American dish where chicken breasts are typically pan-seared and served with a rich, creamy sauce made with spinach, white wine, garlic, and Parmesan cheese.
preparationNotes: Pan-seared chicken breast served in a creamy spinach sauce, often enhanced with Parmesan cheese, garlic, and white wine. Chicken is typically dredged in flour.
customerGuidance: A rich and flavorful chicken dish with tender spinach in a creamy Parmesan and white wine sauce.

name: Chicken Piccata with Lemon, Capers & Parsley
description: A classic Italian dish where chicken cutlets are dredged in flour, pan-fried, and served with a tangy sauce made from lemon juice, butter, capers, and often white wine or chicken stock.
preparationNotes: Pan-fried chicken cutlets served with a bright lemon-butter and caper sauce.
customerGuidance: A zesty and savory chicken dish with a light lemon, butter, and caper sauce.

name: Chicken Cacciatore with Mushrooms, Peppers & Onions
description: A rustic Italian 'hunter-style' chicken stew, braised with onions, herbs, tomatoes, often bell peppers, and sometimes wine.
preparationNotes: Chicken braised in a hearty tomato-based sauce with vegetables like mushrooms, peppers, and onions.
customerGuidance: A flavorful and rustic 'hunter-style' chicken stew with simmered vegetables.

name: Chicken Parmesan White with Sun-dried Tomato & White Wine Cream Sauce
description: A variation of Chicken Parmesan featuring breaded chicken cutlets with a creamy white wine sauce, sun-dried tomatoes, and Parmesan cheese.
preparationNotes: Breaded chicken in a creamy white wine and sun-dried tomato sauce, topped with Parmesan.
customerGuidance: A rich take on Chicken Parmesan with a luscious white wine cream sauce and sun-dried tomatoes.

name: Chicken Parmesan Red with Mozzarella & Tomato Sauce
description: The classic Chicken Parmesan: breaded chicken cutlets topped with tomato sauce and mozzarella cheese, then baked until bubbly.
preparationNotes: Breaded chicken cutlet baked with tomato sauce and mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses.
customerGuidance: The beloved classic: crispy chicken, tangy tomato sauce, and melted mozzarella.

name: Chicken Marsala with Mushrooms & Creamy Marsala Wine Sauce
description: An Italian-American dish of chicken cutlets braised in a rich sauce made with Marsala wine and mushrooms. Can be creamy or not.
preparationNotes: Pan-fried chicken in a savory Marsala wine and mushroom sauce, often with cream.
customerGuidance: Tender chicken in a rich, earthy mushroom and Marsala wine sauce.

name: Chicken Puttanesca with Olives, Capers & Anchovies (Moderately Spicy)
description: Chicken cooked in a vibrant and piquant Puttanesca sauce, typically made with tomatoes, olives, capers, anchovies, garlic, and chili flakes.
preparationNotes: Chicken simmered in a zesty tomato sauce with olives, capers, anchovies, and a hint of spice.
customerGuidance: A boldly flavored chicken dish with a tangy, savory, and slightly spicy tomato sauce.

name: Beef Pizzaiola with Cremini Mushrooms, Peppers & Oregano
description: Beef (often tougher cuts) simmered until tender in a flavorful tomato sauce resembling pizza sauce, with mushrooms, peppers, oregano, and garlic.
preparationNotes: Slow-cooked beef in a rich, pizza-style tomato sauce with mushrooms and peppers.
customerGuidance: Tender beef simmered in a savory tomato, mushroom, and pepper sauce with Italian herbs.

name: Beef Braciole with Parmesan, Salami & Herb Stuffing
description: Thin slices of beef rolled around a savory stuffing (typically breadcrumbs, Parmesan, salami or prosciutto, herbs, garlic) and simmered in tomato sauce.
preparationNotes: Rolled beef stuffed with cheese, cured meat, and herbs, slow-cooked in tomato sauce.
customerGuidance: Flavorful beef rolls stuffed with a savory mixture, simmered in rich tomato sauce.

name: Lasagna with Beef, Pork & Ricotta
description: Classic Italian-American baked pasta dish with layers of wide lasagna noodles, rich meat sauce (beef and pork), ricotta cheese, mozzarella, and Parmesan.
preparationNotes: Layered pasta with meat sauce, ricotta, mozzarella, and Parmesan, baked until golden.
customerGuidance: A hearty and satisfying classic lasagna layered with rich meat sauce and cheeses.

name: Italian Meatballs
description: Classic Italian-American meatballs, typically made from ground beef and/or pork, breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, eggs, and herbs, simmered in tomato sauce.
preparationNotes: Savory ground meat meatballs simmered in tomato sauce.
customerGuidance: Tender and flavorful Italian meatballs, perfect for any occasion.

name: Osso Bucco with Root Vegetables & Red Wine
description: A Milanese specialty of cross-cut veal shanks braised with vegetables, white wine, and broth. Often garnished with gremolata.
preparationNotes: Slow-braised veal shanks with root vegetables in a wine-infused broth.
customerGuidance: Tender, fall-off-the-bone veal shanks in a rich, savory sauce with vegetables.

name: Brasato Al Barolo with Barolo Wine & Tomato
description: A classic Piedmontese dish of beef (typically chuck roast or similar) slow-braised in Barolo wine with vegetables and often tomato until meltingly tender.
preparationNotes: Beef slow-braised in Barolo wine and tomatoes until exceptionally tender.
customerGuidance: Luxuriously tender beef braised in rich Barolo wine, a true taste of Piedmont.

name: Veal Saltimbocca with Prosciutto & Sage
description: The traditional Saltimbocca made with veal cutlets, prosciutto, and fresh sage, pan-fried and often finished with a white wine and butter sauce.
preparationNotes: Veal cutlets layered with prosciutto and sage, pan-fried to perfection.
customerGuidance: An elegant Italian classic: tender veal with savory prosciutto and aromatic sage.

name: Pesce All'Acqua Pazza (Poached Halibut) with Tomatoes, Capers & Lemon
description: 'Fish in crazy water' - a Neapolitan dish of white fish (here, halibut) gently poached in a light, flavorful broth of cherry tomatoes, garlic, parsley, white wine, and a hint of chili.
preparationNotes: Halibut poached in a light, aromatic broth with fresh tomatoes, capers, and lemon.
customerGuidance: Delicate poached halibut in a vibrant, light 'crazy water' broth with tomatoes and capers.

name: Spinach and Ricotta Cannelloni
description: Pasta tubes (cannelloni) filled with a creamy mixture of spinach and ricotta cheese, typically baked in tomato sauce (or béchamel) and topped with Parmesan.
preparationNotes: Pasta tubes filled with spinach and ricotta, baked in sauce with cheese.
customerGuidance: Comforting baked cannelloni filled with creamy spinach and ricotta cheese.

name: Penne Pasta with Marinara
description: Penne pasta served with a classic marinara sauce, a tomato-based sauce typically seasoned with garlic, onions, and herbs.
preparationNotes: Penne pasta with a classic tomato-based marinara sauce.
customerGuidance: Classic penne pasta served with a rich and tangy marinara sauce.

name: Vegetarian Lasagna with Artichoke Hearts & Bechamel Sauce
description: A vegetarian take on lasagna, layered with pasta, artichoke hearts, other vegetables (e.g., spinach, mushrooms), ricotta or other cheeses, and a creamy béchamel sauce.
preparationNotes: Layered pasta with artichoke hearts, vegetables, cheeses, and creamy béchamel sauce.
customerGuidance: A delicious vegetarian lasagna with artichokes and a rich béchamel sauce.

name: Rosemary Roasted Potatoes
description: Potatoes, often cut into chunks or wedges, roasted with olive oil, fresh rosemary, garlic, salt, and pepper until crispy on the outside and tender inside.
preparationNotes: Potatoes roasted with rosemary, garlic, and olive oil until golden and crispy.
customerGuidance: Crispy and flavorful rosemary roasted potatoes, a perfect side.

name: Green Beans Almondine
description: A classic French dish of green beans (haricots verts) blanched or steamed, then sautéed with butter, toasted slivered almonds, and often a squeeze of lemon juice.
preparationNotes: Green beans sautéed with toasted almonds and butter.
customerGuidance: Elegant green beans tossed with toasted almonds and butter.

name: Baked Cauliflower with Bechamel & Shaved Parmesan
description: Cauliflower florets blanched or steamed, then baked in a creamy béchamel sauce, often topped with breadcrumbs and shaved Parmesan cheese.
preparationNotes: Tender cauliflower baked in a creamy béchamel sauce and topped with Parmesan.
customerGuidance: Rich and creamy baked cauliflower with béchamel and Parmesan.

name: Asiago Zucchini Bites
description: Small bites or fritters made with shredded zucchini, Asiago cheese, breadcrumbs, egg, and seasonings, then baked or fried until golden.
preparationNotes: Savory zucchini and Asiago cheese bites, often baked or fried.
customerGuidance: Cheesy and flavorful zucchini bites, perfect for starting a meal.

name: Eggplant Parmesan
description: A classic Italian-American dish with layers of fried or baked eggplant slices, tomato sauce, mozzarella, Parmesan, and basil.
preparationNotes: Layers of eggplant, tomato sauce, and cheeses, baked until bubbly.
customerGuidance: Comforting and classic eggplant Parmesan with rich tomato sauce and melted cheese.

name: Cannellini Beans with Caponata
description: A flavorful dish combining creamy cannellini beans with caponata, a Sicilian sweet and sour relish typically made with eggplant, celery, tomatoes, olives, and capers.
preparationNotes: Cannellini beans served with a sweet and sour Sicilian eggplant relish (caponata).
customerGuidance: A delightful mix of creamy cannellini beans and tangy Sicilian caponata.

name: Peas with Pancetta
description: A simple yet flavorful side dish of sweet peas cooked with savory diced pancetta, often with onions or shallots and a touch of butter or olive oil.
preparationNotes: Sweet peas sautéed with crispy pancetta and onions.
customerGuidance: A savory and satisfying side of peas with crispy Italian bacon.

name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts with Balsamic Crema
description: Brussels sprouts, often halved or quartered, roasted until tender and slightly caramelized, then drizzled with a sweet and tangy balsamic crema or glaze.
preparationNotes: Caramelized roasted Brussels sprouts finished with a balsamic drizzle.
customerGuidance: Deliciously roasted Brussels sprouts with a sweet balsamic finish.

name: Tuscan Roasted Carrots
description: Carrots roasted with olive oil and classic Tuscan herbs such as rosemary, thyme, sage, and garlic, until tender and slightly caramelized.
preparationNotes: Carrots roasted with aromatic Tuscan herbs and garlic.
customerGuidance: Sweet and savory Tuscan-style roasted carrots with fragrant herbs.

name: Penne Pasta with Butter
description: A simple classic: Penne pasta tossed with melted butter and often a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese (optional) and black pepper.
preparationNotes: Penne pasta tossed in butter, optionally with Parmesan.
customerGuidance: Simple and comforting penne pasta with butter.

name: Penne Pasta with Pesto
description: Penne pasta tossed with vibrant pesto sauce, typically made from basil, pine nuts, Parmesan cheese, garlic, and olive oil.
preparationNotes: Penne pasta coated in classic basil pesto sauce.
customerGuidance: Flavorful penne pasta tossed in bright and aromatic pesto.

name: Rigatoni with Butter
description: A simple classic: Rigatoni pasta tossed with melted butter and often a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese (optional) and black pepper.
preparationNotes: Rigatoni pasta tossed in butter, optionally with Parmesan.
customerGuidance: Simple and comforting rigatoni pasta with butter.

name: Rigatoni with Pesto
description: Rigatoni pasta tossed with vibrant pesto sauce, typically made from basil, pine nuts, Parmesan cheese, garlic, and olive oil.
preparationNotes: Rigatoni pasta coated in classic basil pesto sauce.
customerGuidance: Flavorful rigatoni pasta tossed in bright and aromatic pesto.

name: Rigatoni with Marinara
description: Rigatoni pasta served with a classic marinara sauce, a tomato-based sauce typically seasoned with garlic, onions, and herbs.
preparationNotes: Rigatoni pasta with a classic tomato-based marinara sauce.
customerGuidance: Classic rigatoni pasta served with a rich and tangy marinara sauce.

name: Conchiglie with Butter
description: A simple classic: Conchiglie (shell) pasta tossed with melted butter and often a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese (optional) and black pepper.
preparationNotes: Shell pasta tossed in butter, optionally with Parmesan.
customerGuidance: Simple and comforting shell pasta with butter.

name: Conchiglie with Pesto
description: Conchiglie (shell) pasta tossed with vibrant pesto sauce, typically made from basil, pine nuts, Parmesan cheese, garlic, and olive oil. The shells are great for catching the sauce.
preparationNotes: Shell pasta coated in classic basil pesto sauce.
customerGuidance: Flavorful shell pasta tossed in bright and aromatic pesto, perfectly capturing the sauce.

name: Conchiglie with Marinara
description: Conchiglie (shell) pasta served with a classic marinara sauce, a tomato-based sauce typically seasoned with garlic, onions, and herbs. The shells are excellent for holding the sauce.
preparationNotes: Shell pasta with a classic tomato-based marinara sauce.
customerGuidance: Classic shell pasta served with a rich and tangy marinara sauce.

name: Caprese Stuffed Avocado
description: Avocado halves filled with a classic Caprese salad mixture of fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, basil, and often drizzled with balsamic glaze.
preparationNotes: Avocado halves filled with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil.
customerGuidance: Fresh and flavorful Caprese salad nestled in creamy avocado halves.

name: Panzanella Bread Salad
description: A Tuscan chopped salad of soaked stale bread, tomatoes, onions, and cucumbers, often including basil, and dressed with olive oil and vinegar.
preparationNotes: A refreshing Tuscan salad of bread, tomatoes, cucumbers, and onions.
customerGuidance: A hearty and rustic Italian bread salad with fresh summer vegetables.

name: Tossed Italian Cobb Salad
description: An Italian twist on the classic Cobb salad, typically featuring mixed greens, grilled chicken or salami, hard-boiled eggs, tomatoes, avocado, olives, and an Italian vinaigrette.
preparationNotes: A hearty salad with Italian meats/chicken, eggs, vegetables, and vinaigrette.
customerGuidance: A substantial and flavorful Italian-inspired Cobb salad.

name: Sicilian Fennel Salad
description: A refreshing Sicilian salad featuring thinly sliced raw fennel, oranges (or other citrus), red onions, and often black olives, dressed with olive oil and sometimes a hint of vinegar.
preparationNotes: A crisp and bright salad of fennel, oranges, and red onion.
customerGuidance: A zesty and aromatic Sicilian salad with crunchy fennel and sweet oranges.

name: Roasted Beets with Burrata
description: A delightful contrast of sweet roasted beets (often mixed varieties) and creamy, rich burrata cheese, typically dressed with olive oil, balsamic glaze, and perhaps fresh herbs or toasted nuts.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_NUTS (if nuts are added as garnish)
preparationNotes: Sweet roasted beets paired with creamy burrata cheese.
customerGuidance: Earthy roasted beets beautifully complemented by luxurious, creamy burrata.

name: Arugula
description: Fresh arugula leaves, known for their peppery and slightly bitter taste, adding a distinct flavor to sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Peppery arugula leaves.
customerGuidance: Peppery arugula for a zesty sandwich. (Nutrition per 1/2 cup)

name: Caprese
description: A simple Italian salad, made of sliced fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and sweet basil, seasoned with salt and olive oil. Often arranged in layers.
preparationNotes: Slices of fresh mozzarella, ripe tomatoes, and basil, drizzled with olive oil.
customerGuidance: The epitome of Italian simplicity: fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil.

name: Pasta Salad
description: A versatile salad dish made with one or more types of pasta, almost always chilled, and most often tossed in a vinegar, oil, or mayonnaise-based dressing. Typically includes chopped vegetables, cheeses, and sometimes meats.
preparationNotes: Chilled pasta tossed with vegetables and dressing. Specifics vary.
customerGuidance: A refreshing pasta salad. Please ask for today's specific preparation.

name: Tuscan Orzo Pesto Salad
description: A flavorful pasta salad featuring orzo pasta tossed with pesto, sun-dried tomatoes, often with other additions like Kalamata olives, feta cheese, spinach, or toasted pine nuts.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (Parmesan in pesto, feta if used)
CONTAINS_NUTS (pine nuts in pesto and as garnish)
preparationNotes: Orzo pasta with pesto, sun-dried tomatoes, and other Tuscan-inspired ingredients.
customerGuidance: A vibrant and flavorful orzo salad with pesto and Tuscan accents.

name: Caesar Salad
description: A classic salad of romaine lettuce and croutons dressed with lemon juice (or lime juice), olive oil, egg, Worcestershire sauce, anchovies, garlic, Dijon mustard, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper.
preparationNotes: Crisp romaine lettuce with croutons, Parmesan, and creamy Caesar dressing.
customerGuidance: The timeless Caesar salad with its signature creamy, savory dressing.

name: Cabbage Rolls with rice, dried figs, pine nuts, and aromatic herbs
description: Tender cabbage leaves wrapped around a savory filling of rice, dried figs, toasted pine nuts, and aromatic herbs, often simmered in a light broth or tomato sauce.
preparationNotes: Cabbage leaves stuffed with a fragrant mixture of rice, figs, pine nuts, and herbs.
customerGuidance: Delicate cabbage rolls with a unique sweet and savory filling.

name: Eggplant Imam Baildi, sumptuously topped with stewed tomato and peppers
description: A classic Turkish dish where eggplants are slit and stuffed with a mixture of onions, garlic, tomatoes, peppers, and various spices, then slowly baked in olive oil until very tender. The name famously means 'the Imam fainted', supposedly due to its deliciousness or the amount of olive oil used.
preparationNotes: Slow-baked eggplants stuffed with a rich filling of tomatoes, onions, garlic, and peppers in olive oil.
customerGuidance: Melt-in-your-mouth eggplant stuffed with a savory tomato and vegetable mixture, a Turkish classic.

name: Indian Style Stuffed Peppers with fragrant curried chickpeas
description: Bell peppers stuffed with a flavorful Indian-spiced mixture, typically featuring curried chickpeas, rice or quinoa, vegetables like onions and tomatoes, and aromatic spices.
preparationNotes: Bell peppers filled with a fragrant, curried chickpea and vegetable stuffing.
customerGuidance: Flavorful Indian-spiced stuffed peppers with a hearty curried chickpea filling.

name: Eggplant Napolean layered with roasted red peppers
description: A stacked dish (Napolean) featuring layers of grilled or roasted eggplant slices and roasted red peppers, often with a balsamic glaze, fresh herbs, and sometimes goat cheese or mozzarella (though not specified here, making it potentially vegan).
preparationNotes: Layers of roasted eggplant and red peppers, often drizzled with balsamic glaze.
customerGuidance: An elegant stack of roasted eggplant and sweet red peppers.

name: Artichoke Ala Polita with a vibrant lemon tahini sauce
description: A Greek dish ('Artichokes a la City style') where artichoke hearts are stewed with potatoes, carrots, onions, dill, and lemon juice. This version adds a lemon tahini sauce for extra vibrancy.
category: Main Course - Vegetarian / Vegan / Side Dish
preparationNotes: Stewed artichokes with potatoes and carrots, served with a lemon tahini sauce.
customerGuidance: A hearty Greek artichoke stew brightened with a zesty lemon tahini sauce.

name: Stuffed Portabella Mushrooms with hearty stewed lentils
description: Large portabella mushroom caps roasted or grilled and filled with a savory and hearty stuffing of stewed lentils, vegetables, and herbs.
preparationNotes: Portabella mushrooms filled with a savory stewed lentil and vegetable mixture.
customerGuidance: Meaty portabella mushrooms with a satisfying and flavorful lentil stuffing.

name: Wild Rice Stuffed Acorn Squash, a harvest delight
description: Roasted acorn squash halves filled with a flavorful stuffing of wild rice, often mixed with other ingredients like cranberries, pecans, mushrooms, onions, celery, and herbs.
preparationNotes: Roasted acorn squash filled with a savory wild rice, fruit, and nut stuffing.
customerGuidance: A festive and flavorful stuffed acorn squash, perfect for a hearty meal.

name: Spicy Tofu Vindaloo, full of bold flavors
description: A vegetarian/vegan take on the fiery Goan curry, Vindaloo, made with firm tofu marinated and simmered in a spicy and tangy sauce of vinegar, garlic, ginger, chilies, and a blend of aromatic spices.
preparationNotes: Tofu simmered in a very spicy and tangy Vindaloo curry sauce.
customerGuidance: A fiery and flavorful tofu Vindaloo for those who love a spicy kick.

name: Greek Style Stuffed Peppers with aromatic jasmine rice
description: Bell peppers (Yemistes) filled with a savory Greek-inspired mixture of aromatic jasmine rice, onions, tomatoes, fresh herbs like parsley and mint, and sometimes raisins or pine nuts, then baked.
preparationNotes: Bell peppers stuffed with aromatic rice, tomatoes, and fresh Greek herbs.
customerGuidance: Classic Greek stuffed peppers with a fragrant and herby rice filling.

name: Vegan Moussaka with stewed lentils and creamy cauliflower béchamel
description: A plant-based version of the classic Greek layered casserole Moussaka. This version features layers of potatoes, eggplant, a rich stewed lentil ragu, and is topped with a creamy dairy-free béchamel sauce made from cauliflower.
preparationNotes: Layered casserole of eggplant, potatoes, spiced lentil ragu, and creamy cauliflower béchamel.
customerGuidance: A hearty and comforting vegan Moussaka with rich lentils and a creamy cauliflower topping.

name: Stuffed Poblano Peppers with savory rice and beans
description: Mild poblano peppers roasted and stuffed with a savory mixture of rice, black beans, corn, tomatoes, onions, and spices, often topped with cheese or a vegan alternative.
preparationNotes: Roasted poblano peppers filled with a flavorful rice, bean, and corn mixture.
customerGuidance: Flavorful and satisfying stuffed poblano peppers with a savory rice and bean filling.

name: Roasted Lemon Potatoes with oregano
description: Greek-style roasted potatoes that are crispy on the outside and fluffy inside, infused with the bright flavors of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and oregano.
preparationNotes: Potatoes roasted with lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and oregano until tender and golden.
customerGuidance: Tangy and herbaceous Greek-style roasted lemon potatoes.

name: Haricots Verts Almondine
description: A classic French side dish where slender green beans (haricots verts) are blanched until tender-crisp, then tossed with toasted slivered almonds and butter, often with a hint of lemon.
preparationNotes: Tender haricots verts sautéed with toasted almonds and butter.
customerGuidance: Elegant and crisp French green beans with toasted almonds.

name: Fasolakia (Greek green beans stewed with tomatoes)
description: A traditional Greek vegetarian dish (Fasolakia Lathera) where fresh green beans are braised in olive oil with ripe tomatoes, onions, garlic, potatoes (often), and herbs like parsley or dill until very tender.
category: Main Course - Vegetarian / Vegan / Side Dish
preparationNotes: Green beans and often potatoes slow-cooked in a rich tomato and olive oil sauce.
customerGuidance: Comforting Greek stewed green beans in a savory tomato and olive oil base.

name: Gigante Beans baked in a rich tomato dill sauce
description: Large, creamy Greek gigante beans baked in a savory tomato sauce infused with dill, garlic, onions, and olive oil until tender and flavorful.
category: Appetizer / Meze / Side Dish / Light Main
preparationNotes: Large white beans baked in a rich tomato sauce with fresh dill.
customerGuidance: Creamy, large Greek beans baked in a flavorful tomato and dill sauce.

name: Dolmades with bulgur, currants, and dried figs
description: A vegan version of Dolmades (stuffed grape leaves), where tender grape leaves are filled with a mixture of bulgur wheat, sweet currants, chopped dried figs, onions, fresh herbs (like parsley, mint, dill), and pine nuts (optional), then simmered in a lemony broth.
preparationNotes: Grape leaves stuffed with bulgur, currants, figs, and herbs, simmered until tender.
customerGuidance: Flavorful vegan stuffed grape leaves with a unique sweet and savory filling. (Nutritional values per dolma)

name: Cannellini Beans with a sweet & sour caponata
description: Creamy cannellini beans served alongside or mixed with caponata, a traditional Sicilian sweet and sour eggplant relish made with celery, tomatoes, olives, capers, vinegar, and often a touch of sugar.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_NUTS (pine nuts, if used in caponata)
preparationNotes: Cannellini beans paired with a classic Sicilian sweet and sour eggplant caponata.
customerGuidance: A vibrant and flavorful combination of creamy beans and tangy caponata.

name: Roasted Brussel Sprouts with balsamic glaze
description: Brussels sprouts roasted until tender-crisp and caramelized, then finished with a drizzle of sweet and tangy balsamic glaze.
preparationNotes: Crispy roasted Brussels sprouts with a sweet balsamic glaze.
customerGuidance: Perfectly roasted Brussels sprouts with a tangy balsamic finish.

name: Moroccan-Style Roasted Cauliflower with exotic spices
description: Cauliflower florets roasted with a blend of exotic Moroccan spices such as cumin, coriander, turmeric, cinnamon, and paprika, often with garlic and olive oil.
preparationNotes: Cauliflower roasted with a warm and aromatic blend of Moroccan spices.
customerGuidance: Aromatic and tender roasted cauliflower infused with exotic Moroccan spices.

name: Tuscan Glazed Carrots with herbs
description: Carrots, often whole or halved, glazed with a mixture that might include balsamic vinegar, honey or maple syrup, olive oil, and classic Tuscan herbs like rosemary and thyme.
dietaryFlags: VEGAN_OPTION (if using maple syrup instead of honey)
preparationNotes: Carrots glazed with a sweet and savory mixture and roasted with Tuscan herbs.
customerGuidance: Tender, sweet, and herbaceous Tuscan glazed carrots.

name: Moroccan Wild Rice Pilaf with dried fruits and nuts
description: A fragrant wild rice pilaf infused with Moroccan flavors, featuring ingredients like dried fruits (apricots, raisins, dates), toasted nuts (almonds, pistachios), onions, garlic, and warm spices (cinnamon, cumin, turmeric, ginger).
preparationNotes: Aromatic wild rice pilaf with Moroccan spices, dried fruits, and nuts.
customerGuidance: An exotic and flavorful Moroccan wild rice pilaf with sweet and savory notes.

name: Cilantro-Lime Rice, fresh and zesty
description: Fluffy rice (typically long-grain white rice) seasoned with fresh cilantro, lime juice, and often a touch of lime zest and salt. A popular side for Mexican and Southwestern dishes.
preparationNotes: Rice flavored with fresh cilantro and lime juice.
customerGuidance: Bright, zesty, and refreshing cilantro-lime rice.

name: Greek Rice Pilaf with fresh herbs
description: A savory Greek rice pilaf, typically made with long-grain rice sautéed with onions and garlic, then simmered in broth and seasoned with fresh herbs like parsley, dill, and sometimes lemon juice.
preparationNotes: Flavorful rice pilaf cooked with broth and fresh Greek herbs.
customerGuidance: Aromatic and herby Greek-style rice pilaf.

name: Southwest Style Spring Rolls with a zesty dip
description: Crispy spring rolls filled with a Southwestern-inspired mixture, often including ingredients like chicken or black beans, corn, bell peppers, onions, cheese, and spices, served with a zesty dipping sauce (e.g., avocado-lime crema, chipotle aioli).
preparationNotes: Crispy spring rolls with a savory Southwestern filling, served with dip.
customerGuidance: Crispy spring rolls packed with Southwestern flavors, served with a zesty dip. (Nutritional values per roll, before dip)

name: Crispy Falafel with tahini drizzle
description: Deep-fried balls or patties made from ground chickpeas and/or fava beans, herbs, and spices. Served crispy, often with a drizzle of tahini sauce.
allergenAlerts: POTENTIAL_WHEAT (if wheat flour used as binder, verify if chickpea flour only)
preparationNotes: Crispy fried patties of ground chickpeas and herbs, served with tahini sauce.
customerGuidance: Deliciously crispy falafel made from chickpeas and herbs, drizzled with tahini. (Nutritional values approximate per piece)

name: Tuscan Panzanella Bread Salad
description: A classic Tuscan summer salad made with stale bread, ripe juicy tomatoes, cucumbers, red onions, and fresh basil, dressed with olive oil and vinegar. Variations may include other vegetables or anchovies.
preparationNotes: A refreshing salad of soaked bread, ripe tomatoes, cucumbers, onions, and basil.
customerGuidance: A hearty and flavorful Tuscan bread salad, perfect for summer.

name: Sicilian Fennel & Orange Salad
description: A vibrant and refreshing Sicilian salad combining thinly sliced raw fennel, sweet orange segments, red onion, and often black olives, dressed simply with olive oil.
preparationNotes: A crisp salad of thinly sliced fennel, juicy oranges, red onion, and olives.
customerGuidance: A delightful Sicilian salad with crunchy fennel, sweet oranges, and savory olives.

name: Mediterranean Bowtie Pasta Salad
description: A cold pasta salad featuring bowtie (farfalle) pasta tossed with Mediterranean ingredients like cucumbers, tomatoes, Kalamata olives, feta cheese, red onion, and a lemon-herb vinaigrette.
preparationNotes: Bowtie pasta salad with fresh vegetables, feta, olives, and a lemon-herb dressing.
customerGuidance: A refreshing and flavorful pasta salad with a taste of the Mediterranean.

name: Tuscan Orzo Pesto Salad with sun-dried tomatoes
description: A vibrant orzo pasta salad with a Tuscan flair, featuring pesto, sweet sun-dried tomatoes, often baby spinach or arugula, and sometimes toasted pine nuts or Parmesan.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_NUTS (pine nuts in pesto and as garnish)
preparationNotes: Orzo pasta salad with rich pesto, sun-dried tomatoes, and fresh greens.
customerGuidance: A delightful Tuscan-inspired orzo salad with vibrant pesto and sun-dried tomatoes.

name: Fresh Garden Salad with a choice of vegan dressings
description: A crisp salad of mixed fresh greens and assorted garden vegetables like tomatoes, cucumbers, carrots, and red onions, served with a selection of vegan dressing options.
allergenAlerts: ALLERGENS_DEPEND_ON_DRESSING_CHOICE (e.g., soy, nuts, sesame in some vegan dressings - please verify)
preparationNotes: A simple mix of fresh greens and vegetables, served with vegan dressing choices.
customerGuidance: A classic fresh garden salad with a variety of vegan dressings available. (Nutritional values exclude dressing)

name: Greek Village Salad (Horiatiki) with vegan feta alternative

description: Classic comfort food featuring cooked macaroni pasta in a rich, creamy cheese sauce, often baked with a crispy topping.
preparationNotes: Creamy baked macaroni and cheese. Contains gluten and dairy.
customerGuidance: The ultimate creamy and cheesy comfort food. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Baked Potato Bar
description: A customizable baked potato station where guests can load their fluffy baked potatoes with a variety of toppings like butter, sour cream, cheese, chives, bacon bits, and chili.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SOY (potentially in chili or bacon bits)
preparationNotes: Interactive station for creating personalized loaded baked potatoes. Many toppings available; dietary suitability depends on choices.
customerGuidance: Create your ultimate loaded baked potato! (Values vary greatly with toppings).

name: Garlic Mashed Potatoes
description: Creamy mashed potatoes infused with the savory flavor of roasted or sautéed garlic, typically made with butter and milk or cream.
preparationNotes: Creamy mashed potatoes with garlic. Contains dairy.
customerGuidance: Smooth and flavorful garlic mashed potatoes. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Mini Smashed Potatoes
description: Small potatoes that are boiled until tender, then smashed flat, seasoned, and roasted or fried until crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.
preparationNotes: Small potatoes, boiled, smashed, and roasted or fried until crispy. Can be made vegan/dairy-free if oil is used instead of butter.
customerGuidance: Crispy on the outside, fluffy on the inside. Ask about preparation if dairy is a concern. (Values per approx. 1 cup serving).

name: Twice Baked Potatoes
description: Baked potatoes where the flesh is scooped out, mixed with ingredients like butter, sour cream, cheese, and chives, then returned to the potato skins and baked again until golden.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SOY (potentially in bacon bits if used)
preparationNotes: Potato skins filled with a creamy, cheesy potato mixture and baked again. Typically contains dairy and often bacon.
customerGuidance: A rich and satisfying loaded potato experience. (Values per potato half/small potato).

name: Corn on the Cob
description: Fresh ears of corn, typically boiled, steamed, or grilled, often served with butter and salt.
preparationNotes: Sweet corn cooked on the cob. Served plain; butter available separately.
customerGuidance: Sweet and simple corn on the cob. (Values per ear, without butter).

name: Creamed Corn
description: Sweet corn kernels cooked in a creamy sauce, typically made with milk or cream, butter, and sometimes a thickener like flour.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (if flour is used as thickener)
preparationNotes: Sweet corn in a creamy sauce. Contains dairy and may contain gluten if thickened with flour.
customerGuidance: Rich and creamy sweet corn. (Values per 1/2 cup serving).

name: Jalapeño Poppers
description: Jalapeño peppers halved, deseeded, filled with a creamy cheese mixture (often cream cheese and cheddar), then breaded and deep-fried or baked until golden.
preparationNotes: Spicy jalapeños filled with cheese, breaded, and fried or baked. Contains dairy, wheat, and egg. May sometimes include bacon.
customerGuidance: Cheesy, spicy, and crispy jalapeño poppers. (Values per popper).

name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts
description: Brussels sprouts, often halved or quartered, tossed with olive oil, salt, and pepper, then roasted until tender on the inside and caramelized and slightly crispy on the outside.
preparationNotes: Brussels sprouts roasted until tender and caramelized. Typically prepared simply, but inquire about any glazes or additions (e.g., bacon, nuts, balsamic which may contain sulphites).
customerGuidance: Deliciously caramelized roasted Brussels sprouts. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Corn Bread
description: A quick bread made with cornmeal, often with a slightly sweet or savory flavor and a crumbly texture. Can be baked in a pan, skillet, or as muffins.
preparationNotes: Classic cornbread. Contains wheat, egg, and dairy.
customerGuidance: Moist and flavorful traditional cornbread. (Values per average slice/muffin).

name: Jalapeno cornbread
description: Cornbread with the added kick of diced jalapeño peppers, offering a balance of sweet, savory, and spicy flavors. Often includes cheese as well.
preparationNotes: Cornbread with jalapeños for a spicy kick. Contains wheat, egg, and dairy.
customerGuidance: Moist cornbread with a pleasant jalapeño spice. (Values per average slice/muffin).

name: Grilled Vegetables
description: A medley of seasonal vegetables, such as bell peppers, zucchini, yellow squash, asparagus, and onions, lightly seasoned and grilled to bring out their natural sweetness and smoky flavor.
preparationNotes: A mix of seasonal vegetables, grilled with simple seasonings. Check for any specific glazes or marinades used.
customerGuidance: A healthy and flavorful assortment of grilled seasonal vegetables. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Grilled Asparagus
description: Fresh asparagus spears, lightly tossed with olive oil, salt, and pepper, then grilled until tender-crisp with a slight char.
preparationNotes: Asparagus spears grilled with simple seasoning. Check for any accompanying sauces or drizzles.
customerGuidance: Tender-crisp grilled asparagus with a hint of char. (Values per approx. 100-150g serving).

name: Caesar
description: A classic salad of romaine lettuce and croutons dressed with lemon juice (or lime), olive oil, egg, Worcestershire sauce, anchovies, garlic, Dijon mustard, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper.
preparationNotes: Traditionally made with romaine lettuce and a creamy dressing containing anchovies and Parmesan cheese. Croutons add a crunchy texture.
customerGuidance: A rich and savory classic salad. Not vegetarian due to anchovies in dressing.

name: Coleslaw
description: A salad of finely shredded raw cabbage, often with shredded carrots, dressed with a vinaigrette or a creamy dressing typically made with mayonnaise.
preparationNotes: Creamy and crunchy, a popular side for barbecue and fried foods. Dressing often contains mayonnaise.
customerGuidance: Classic creamy and tangy coleslaw. Contains egg.

name: Wedge Salad
description: A classic American salad made from a wedge of iceberg lettuce topped with blue cheese dressing, bacon crumbles, tomatoes, and sometimes red onions.
preparationNotes: A crisp wedge of iceberg lettuce generously topped with creamy blue cheese dressing and savory bacon.
customerGuidance: Crisp and refreshing with a rich, tangy blue cheese dressing and bacon.

name: German cucumber salad
description: A refreshing salad made with thinly sliced cucumbers, often with dill, and a dressing that can be creamy (with sour cream or yogurt) or vinaigrette-based.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_DAIRY (if made with sour cream/yogurt)
preparationNotes: Thinly sliced cucumbers in a tangy dressing. Can be creamy or clear. Check daily preparation for dairy.
customerGuidance: Refreshing cucumber salad with dill. Ask if you prefer a non-creamy version (if available).

name: Crunchy Asian Slaw
description: A vibrant and crunchy slaw featuring shredded cabbage and other vegetables, often with nuts or seeds, dressed in a tangy soy-sesame vinaigrette.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (if traditional soy sauce is used)
May contain CONTAINS_HONEY (if used as sweetener, affects vegan status)
preparationNotes: Features a mix of crunchy vegetables with a sweet and savory Asian-inspired dressing. Often contains nuts.
customerGuidance: Colorful, crunchy slaw with an Asian-style vinaigrette. Typically contains nuts and sesame.

name: Tossed Cobb Salad
description: A substantial American garden salad typically made with chopped salad greens, tomato, crisp bacon, grilled or roasted chicken breast, hard-boiled eggs, avocado, chives, Roquefort cheese, and red-wine vinaigrette.
preparationNotes: A hearty and flavorful salad with a variety of textures and ingredients, often served as a main course.
customerGuidance: A satisfying main-course salad packed with chicken, bacon, egg, avocado, and blue cheese.

name: Classic Potato Salad
description: A traditional American side dish made from boiled potatoes, typically dressed with mayonnaise, mustard, and various other ingredients like celery, onion, and hard-boiled eggs.
preparationNotes: Creamy, chunky potato salad, a staple at picnics and gatherings. Contains egg.
customerGuidance: Comforting and familiar creamy potato salad.

name: German Potato Salad
description: A potato salad variety that usually includes a vinegar and bacon-based dressing, often served warm or at room temperature, distinct from creamy American-style potato salads.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if flour used for thickening)
preparationNotes: Tangy and savory potato salad with a warm bacon vinaigrette. Often dairy-free, but may contain wheat.
customerGuidance: A unique, warm potato salad with a sweet and sour bacon dressing.

name: Macaroni Salad
description: A type of pasta salad, served cold, made with cooked elbow macaroni and usually prepared with a mayonnaise-based dressing. Various other ingredients like celery, onion, and bell peppers are often included.
preparationNotes: Creamy, chilled macaroni salad, a popular deli-style side. Contains egg and wheat.
customerGuidance: Classic creamy macaroni salad, perfect for a comforting side.

name: Hawaiian Macaroni Salad
description: A distinctive macaroni salad popular in Hawaii, known for its very creamy texture, achieved by overcooking the pasta and using a generous amount of mayonnaise, often with shredded carrots and a touch of vinegar.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_DAIRY (if milk is used)
preparationNotes: Uniquely creamy and slightly tangy macaroni salad, a Hawaiian plate lunch staple. Pasta is intentionally soft.
customerGuidance: Authentic, super creamy Hawaiian-style mac salad.

name: Fruit Salad
description: A dish consisting of various kinds of fruit, sometimes served in a liquid, either their own juices or a syrup. It can be served as an appetizer, a side salad, or a dessert.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if certain dried fruits or lemon/lime juice concentrate is used, or to prevent browning)
preparationNotes: A refreshing assortment of fresh fruits. Selection may vary daily.
customerGuidance: A light and healthy mix of seasonal fresh fruits.

name: Kansas City BBQ Sauce
description: A thick, sweet, and tangy tomato-based barbecue sauce, often with molasses. It's known for its rich flavor and reddish-brown color.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SOY (in Worcestershire or other flavorings)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if certain thickeners or Worcestershire sauce used)
preparationNotes: Classic sweet, tangy, and smoky BBQ sauce. Check for anchovies in Worcestershire for vegan suitability.
customerGuidance: Rich, sweet, and tangy Kansas City style BBQ sauce.

name: South Carolina Gold BBQ Sauce
description: A mustard-based barbecue sauce, tangy and slightly sweet, characteristic of South Carolina. It gets its golden color from yellow mustard.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SOY (in Worcestershire or other flavorings)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if certain thickeners or Worcestershire sauce used)
May contain CONTAINS_HONEY (if used as sweetener, affects vegan status)
preparationNotes: Tangy and zesty mustard-based BBQ sauce. Check for anchovies/honey for vegan suitability.
customerGuidance: Tangy and unique South Carolina style mustard BBQ sauce.

name: North Carolina Vinegar based BBQ Sauce
description: A thin, tangy, and spicy barbecue sauce originating from Eastern North Carolina. It's primarily made of vinegar, red pepper flakes, and other spices, with no tomato.
preparationNotes: Very tangy and spicy, thin vinegar-based sauce. Excellent for cutting richness.
customerGuidance: Sharp, tangy, and spicy North Carolina style vinegar BBQ sauce.

name: Alabama White BBQ Sauce
description: A unique mayonnaise-based barbecue sauce with a tangy and peppery flavor, often including vinegar, lemon juice, and horseradish. Popular with chicken.
preparationNotes: Creamy, tangy, and peppery mayonnaise-based sauce. Contains egg.
customerGuidance: Zesty and creamy Alabama style white BBQ sauce.

name: Texas BBQ Sauce
description: Texas barbecue sauces vary by region, but often are less sweet than Kansas City style, sometimes tomato-based with a spicy kick from chili peppers, or a simple beef-broth based 'mop sauce'. This version typically refers to a moderately thick, tangy, and savory tomato-based sauce with a smoky element.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SOY (in Worcestershire or other flavorings)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if certain thickeners or Worcestershire sauce used)
preparationNotes: Typically savory and tangy, often less sweet than other styles, with smoky and spicy notes. May contain beef broth.
customerGuidance: Bold and savory Texas style BBQ sauce, often with a peppery kick.

name: Very Berry BBQ Sauce
description: A sweet and tangy barbecue sauce infused with the flavor of mixed berries, offering a fruity twist on traditional BBQ sauce.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_HONEY (if used as sweetener, affects vegan status)
preparationNotes: Fruity, sweet, and tangy BBQ sauce with a distinct berry flavor. Vegan status depends on sweetener.
customerGuidance: A unique BBQ sauce with a sweet and tart berry infusion.

name: Smoky bourbon BBQ Sauce
description: A rich and robust barbecue sauce featuring the smoky notes of bourbon whiskey, typically with a sweet and tangy tomato base.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SOY (in Worcestershire or other flavorings)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if certain thickeners or Worcestershire sauce used)
preparationNotes: Deep, smoky, and slightly sweet BBQ sauce with a hint of bourbon. Alcohol content is typically negligible after cooking.
customerGuidance: Rich and smoky BBQ sauce with a sophisticated bourbon kick.

name: Ketchup
description: A sweet and tangy sauce typically made from tomatoes, sugar, vinegar, and various seasonings and spices.
preparationNotes: Classic tomato-based condiment.
customerGuidance: Familiar sweet and tangy tomato ketchup.

name: Stone Ground Mustard
description: A type of mustard made with coarsely ground brown mustard seeds, giving it a rustic texture and robust, pungent flavor.
preparationNotes: Coarsely ground mustard with a hearty texture and strong flavor.
customerGuidance: Robust and flavorful stone ground mustard.

name: Dijon Mustard
description: A traditional mustard from Dijon, France, made from brown mustard seeds and verjuice (unripe grape juice) or white wine, known for its sharp, tangy flavor and pale yellow color.
preparationNotes: Sharp, tangy, and smooth mustard, often used in dressings and sauces.
customerGuidance: Classic sharp and smooth Dijon mustard.

name: Yellow Mustard
description: A mild American mustard, bright yellow in color due to the use of turmeric. It's made from finely ground mustard seeds, vinegar, spices, and water.
preparationNotes: Mild, tangy, and bright yellow, often called 'ballpark mustard'.
customerGuidance: Classic mild yellow mustard.

name: Mayonnaise
description: A thick, creamy dressing or sauce made of oil, egg yolks, vinegar or lemon juice, and seasonings.
preparationNotes: Creamy emulsion of oil and egg yolk. Contains egg.
customerGuidance: Rich and creamy mayonnaise.

name: Sweet pickle Chips
description: Thinly sliced cucumbers pickled in a sweet brine, often including sugar, vinegar, and spices like mustard seed and celery seed.
preparationNotes: Crisp, sweet, and tangy pickle slices.
customerGuidance: Sweet and tangy crinkle-cut pickle chips.

name: Dill pickle Chips
description: Thinly sliced cucumbers pickled in a brine flavored with dill, vinegar, and other spices, offering a sour and savory taste.
preparationNotes: Crisp, sour, and garlicky pickle slices with prominent dill flavor.
customerGuidance: Classic tangy and garlicky dill pickle chips.

name: Sweet Relish
description: A condiment made of finely chopped pickled cucumbers, sweetened with sugar or corn syrup, and flavored with various spices. Often used on hot dogs and in salads.
preparationNotes: Finely chopped pickled cucumbers in a sweet and tangy base.
customerGuidance: Sweet and tangy chopped pickle relish.

name: Cranberry Relish
description: A relish made from cranberries, often with sugar, citrus (orange), and sometimes nuts or other fruits. Typically served with poultry, especially at Thanksgiving.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_NUTS (pecans, walnuts). Please inquire if nut-free is required.
CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if commercial orange juice/zest or certain dried fruits used)
preparationNotes: Tart and sweet relish made from fresh cranberries, often with citrus. Check for nut content.
customerGuidance: Tart and sweet cranberry relish, often with citrus notes. May contain nuts.

name: Kimchi
description: A traditional Korean side dish of salted and fermented vegetables, such as napa cabbage and Korean radish, made with a widely varying selection of seasonings including gochugaru (Korean chili powder), spring onions, garlic, ginger, and jeotgal (salted seafood).
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SHELLFISH (fermented shrimp paste). Allergen content can vary; inquire for specific batch details if concerned, especially for vegetarian/vegan needs.
preparationNotes: Spicy, sour, and umami-rich fermented Korean staple. Typically contains fish/shellfish products.
customerGuidance: Authentic spicy and tangy fermented Korean kimchi. Usually contains seafood ingredients.

name: Mixed Pickled Vegetables - Giardiniera
description: An Italian relish of pickled vegetables in vinegar or oil. Common vegetables include cauliflower, carrots, celery, bell peppers, and gherkins.
preparationNotes: Tangy and crunchy mixed pickled vegetables. Can be spicy depending on pepperoncini or chili content.
customerGuidance: Crunchy and tangy Italian-style mixed pickled vegetables.

name: Chicken
description: Chicken, typically breast or thigh meat, prepared simply such as grilled, roasted, or pan-seared. Offered as a protein option.
preparationNotes: Simply prepared chicken. Please inquire about the specific cut (e.g., breast, thigh) and any marinades or glazes used today.
customerGuidance: Versatile chicken protein option. (Values for 100g cooked boneless, skinless chicken breast).

name: Papoutsakia - Classic moussaka in individual hollowed eggplant shells with seasoned ground beef and topped with creamy bechamel
description: A traditional Greek dish, 'Papoutsakia' means 'little shoes'. It consists of baked eggplant halves stuffed with a savory ground meat (typically beef or lamb) and tomato sauce, then topped with a creamy béchamel sauce and baked until golden.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (milk, butter, cheese in béchamel and topping)
preparationNotes: Baked stuffed eggplants with seasoned ground meat and a rich béchamel topping, similar to individual moussakas.
customerGuidance: Delicious Greek 'little shoes' – savory meat-stuffed eggplants topped with creamy béchamel.

name: Soutzoukakia - Plump oblong-shaped meatballs are packed with loads of aromatics and fresh herbs, smothered in a cinnamon wine-enhanced tomato sauce
description: Soutzoukakia Smyrneika are Greek baked meatballs from Smyrna, characterized by their oblong shape and rich, aromatic tomato sauce flavored with cumin, cinnamon, and wine.
preparationNotes: Aromatic, oblong meatballs baked in a rich tomato sauce spiced with cumin and cinnamon.
customerGuidance: Flavorful Greek meatballs in a unique cinnamon and wine-infused tomato sauce.

name: Kokinisto - Boneless short rib slowly cooked in cinnamon-scented tomato sauce
description: A traditional Greek comfort dish, Kokinisto features tender boneless beef short ribs braised slowly in a rich, aromatic tomato sauce, characteristically scented with cinnamon, cloves, and other warm spices.
preparationNotes: Beef short ribs slow-cooked until meltingly tender in a cinnamon-spiced tomato sauce. Typically served over rice, pasta, or potatoes.
customerGuidance: Tender, aromatic short ribs in a classic Greek cinnamon-tomato sauce.

name: Kleftiko - (Family style only) Boldly seasoned lamb roast that cooks with new potatoes, celery, and carrots, low and slow for 6 hours, in a parchment paper pouch
description: A traditional Greek celebratory lamb dish. Lamb (often leg or shoulder) is boldly seasoned with garlic, oregano, and lemon, then slow-roasted for hours in a parchment paper pouch along with new potatoes, celery, and carrots, sealing in all the juices and flavors.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (potentially, if feta cheese is included, please inquire)
preparationNotes: Lamb slow-roasted in parchment paper with potatoes and vegetables for exceptional tenderness. Served family style. Inquire if feta cheese is part of this specific recipe.
suitableForDiets: PALEO_FRIENDLY (if no cheese and specific preparation)
customerGuidance: Succulent, slow-cooked lamb and vegetables, bursting with flavor. Perfect for sharing.

name: Psari Plaki - Oven-baked fish fillet topped with fresh tomato slices, onion, and fresh herbs
description: A traditional Greek baked fish dish. Psari Plaki features fish fillets (often a firm white fish like cod, snapper, or porgy) baked with a generous topping of sliced tomatoes, onions, garlic, olive oil, and fresh herbs like parsley and oregano.
preparationNotes: Fish fillets baked with a savory topping of tomatoes, onions, and herbs. A light and flavorful dish.
customerGuidance: Delicate baked fish with fresh Mediterranean flavors.

name: Pastitsio - Classic baked pasta dish with cinnamon-scented ground meat and creamy béchamel sauce
description: A beloved Greek baked pasta casserole. Pastitsio features layers of long tubular pasta (like bucatini or special Pastitsio pasta), a rich, cinnamon-spiced ground meat sauce (typically beef or a mix), and is topped with a thick, creamy béchamel sauce and often a sprinkle of cheese.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if wine is used in meat sauce)
preparationNotes: A hearty layered baked pasta dish with spiced meat sauce and creamy béchamel. Contains wheat, dairy, and egg.
customerGuidance: The ultimate Greek comfort food – rich, creamy, and satisfying.

name: Kotopoulo lemonato - Aromatic and lemony baked chicken with fresh herbs
description: A classic Greek dish of tender chicken pieces (often bone-in, skin-on) baked until golden with a vibrant, aromatic sauce of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, oregano, and other fresh herbs. Potatoes are often roasted alongside the chicken.
preparationNotes: Chicken baked with a zesty lemon, garlic, and herb sauce. Often served with roasted potatoes cooked in the same pan.
suitableForDiets: PALEO_FRIENDLY (if no/minimal added sugar in broth if used)
customerGuidance: Bright, flavorful, and tender lemon-herb baked chicken.

name: Paidakia - These Greek lamb chops are marinated in a mix of olive oil, lemon juice, garlic and oregano and grilled to perfection
description: Paidakia are succulent Greek-style lamb chops, typically marinated in a classic mixture of extra virgin olive oil, fresh lemon juice, minced garlic, and dried oregano, then grilled over high heat to achieve a flavorful char and tender interior.
preparationNotes: Lamb chops marinated in olive oil, lemon, garlic, and oregano, then grilled. Cooked to order.
customerGuidance: Classic Greek grilled lamb chops – intensely flavorful and tender.

name: Kotsi Arni - Slowly roasted lamb shank with tomato, herbs and robust spices such as cinnamon and clove
description: A hearty Greek dish of lamb shanks (Kotsi Arni) slowly roasted or braised until fall-off-the-bone tender in a rich sauce, often tomato-based, and flavored with herbs and robust warm spices like cinnamon and cloves.
preparationNotes: Lamb shanks slow-cooked in a tomato and spice-infused sauce until exceptionally tender. Often served with orzo, mashed potatoes, or rice.
customerGuidance: Fork-tender lamb shanks in a rich, aromatic Greek-style sauce.

name: Bifteki Gemisto - Aromatic oven-baked minced beef 'burgers', stuffed with cheese and topped with tomato relish
description: A popular Greek dish of seasoned minced beef patties (biftekia) that are stuffed with cheese (often feta or a melting cheese like kasseri), then oven-baked or grilled. Typically served with a fresh tomato relish or sauce.
preparationNotes: Seasoned beef patties stuffed with cheese, baked or grilled, and served with tomato relish. Please inquire if breadcrumbs or egg are used.
customerGuidance: Flavorful Greek-style beef patties with a melted cheese center.

name: Brizola Solomou - Grilled salmon steaks with fresh herbs, lemon, and evoo
description: Grilled salmon steaks (Brizola Solomou) prepared in a classic Greek style, seasoned with fresh herbs (like oregano, thyme, or dill), fresh lemon juice, and extra virgin olive oil (EVOO).
preparationNotes: Salmon steaks grilled and seasoned with lemon, olive oil, and fresh Greek herbs.
customerGuidance: Healthy and delicious grilled salmon with classic Greek seasonings.

name: Bakaliaros Plaki - Oven-baked Cod fish fillet topped with fresh tomato slices, onion, and fresh herbs
description: Bakaliaros Plaki is a Greek baked cod dish. Cod fish fillets are topped with sliced fresh tomatoes, onions, garlic, olive oil, and aromatic fresh herbs like parsley and oregano, then baked until tender and flavorful.
preparationNotes: Cod fillets baked with a savory topping of tomatoes, onions, and herbs. A light and healthy option.
customerGuidance: Tender baked cod with fresh tomato and herb topping.

name: Aginares Ala Polita - Vegan option - Artichoke hearts braised with potatoes and carrots and finished with a creamy egg-lemon sauce and fresh dill
description: A traditional Greek vegan dish (Aginares A La Polita) featuring tender artichoke hearts braised with potatoes, carrots, onions, and abundant fresh dill in a light, lemony olive oil broth. The 'creamy egg-lemon sauce' mentioned in the name for this vegan option is prepared using plant-based ingredients to achieve creaminess, or refers to the lemony broth itself, without actual egg or dairy.
preparationNotes: A hearty vegan stew of artichokes, potatoes, and carrots in a lemony dill sauce. The dish is confirmed vegan, any 'creamy sauce' effect is achieved without animal products.
customerGuidance: A flavorful and satisfying vegan Greek stew with artichokes and vegetables.

name: Gemista - Vegan Oven-baked stuffed tomatoes and peppers with rice, and fresh herbs
description: Gemista (or Yemista) are traditional Greek vegetables, typically tomatoes and bell peppers, hollowed out and stuffed with a flavorful mixture of rice, onions, fresh herbs like parsley and mint, and sometimes pine nuts or currants, then baked until tender in olive oil.
preparationNotes: Oven-baked tomatoes and peppers stuffed with herbed rice. A classic vegan Greek dish. Some recipes include pine nuts; please confirm if nut allergies are a concern.
customerGuidance: Flavorful rice-stuffed vegetables, a taste of Greek summer. (Values per 1 large stuffed vegetable).

name: Hummus - Chickpea, tahini, lemon
description: A smooth and creamy Middle Eastern dip or spread made from cooked, mashed chickpeas blended with tahini (sesame paste), fresh lemon juice, and garlic. Often garnished with olive oil and paprika or parsley.
preparationNotes: Classic chickpea and tahini dip. Contains sesame.
customerGuidance: Creamy and savory chickpea dip with tahini and lemon. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

name: Spanakopita - House made phyllo dough pouches stuffed with spinach, greens, herbs, and feta cheese
description: A classic Greek savory pie or individual pouches made with flaky, house-made phyllo dough, filled with a mixture of spinach, various greens (like chard or leeks), fresh herbs (dill, parsley), and tangy feta cheese.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (feta cheese, butter if used in phyllo)
CONTAINS_EGG (if used as binder in filling)
preparationNotes: Savory spinach and feta pie in flaky phyllo pastry. Contains wheat and dairy. Please inquire if egg is used in the filling.
customerGuidance: Crispy, flaky, and flavorful spinach and feta phyllo pie. (Values per typical triangular portion).

name: Kritharaki - Orzo pasta baked in the oven. A pasta side dish choice with any main
description: Kritharaki, also known as orzo, is a small, rice-shaped pasta. In this Greek preparation, it's typically baked in the oven, often with tomato sauce, broth, onions, and herbs, resulting in a flavorful and tender side dish.
preparationNotes: Orzo pasta baked until tender, often in a light tomato-herb sauce. Confirm if chicken broth or cheese is used if vegan/dairy-free is required.
customerGuidance: Flavorful baked orzo pasta, a classic Greek side. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Gigandes Plaki - Oven baked lima beans in a herbaceous tomato sauce
description: Gigandes Plaki are giant dried white lima beans (Gigantes beans) baked in a rich, herbaceous tomato sauce with onions, garlic, olive oil, and plenty of fresh herbs like dill, parsley, and oregano. A hearty and flavorful vegetarian Greek classic.
preparationNotes: Large lima beans baked in a savory tomato and herb sauce. A staple of Greek cuisine.
customerGuidance: Hearty and delicious oven-baked giant lima beans.

name: Tyrokroketes - A blend of three Greek cheeses rolled into delightful tangy balls and coated with sesame seeds
description: Tyrokroketes are Greek cheese croquettes. They are made from a blend of tangy and melty Greek cheeses (often feta, kefalotyri, graviera), sometimes with a hint of spice or herbs, rolled into balls, coated (this version specifies sesame seeds, traditionally often breadcrumbs), and fried until golden and crispy.
preparationNotes: Fried cheese balls made with a blend of Greek cheeses and coated in sesame seeds. Contains dairy, egg, wheat, and sesame.
customerGuidance: Crispy, tangy, and irresistible Greek cheese balls with sesame. (Values per ball).

name: Octapodi - Spanish octopus slowly braised and served simply with lemon juice, EVOO, and fresh oregano
description: Tender Spanish octopus, slowly braised to perfection, then often finished on the grill for a slight char. Served in a classic Greek style, dressed simply with fresh lemon juice, extra virgin olive oil (EVOO), and fresh oregano.
preparationNotes: Octopus braised until tender, then typically grilled and dressed with lemon, olive oil, and oregano.
customerGuidance: Tender, flavorful braised and grilled octopus, a Greek delicacy. (Values per 100g serving).

name: Dolmades - Grape leaves stuffed with rice and fresh herbs
description: Dolmades (or Dolmadakia Yialantzi if meatless) are tender grape leaves stuffed with a savory mixture of rice, onions, and copious fresh herbs like parsley, mint, and dill. They are gently simmered in a lemony broth with olive oil.
preparationNotes: Grape leaves stuffed with herbed rice. A classic vegan Greek meze. Check if pine nuts are included.
customerGuidance: Tender, flavorful rice-stuffed grape leaves. (Values per dolma).

name: Saganaki Cheese - Cheese is deep fried to make a crispy outside, with a melty gooey inside. Flambeed tableside! (Family style only)
description: A spectacular Greek appetizer where a firm, salty Greek cheese (like Kefalotyri, Kefalograviera, or Kasseri) is pan-fried or deep-fried until it has a crispy golden-brown crust and a molten, gooey interior. It is famously flambéed tableside with brandy or ouzo, and a squeeze of lemon is added to douse the flames.
preparationNotes: Fried Greek cheese, flambéed tableside. Contains dairy and wheat. Alcohol is used in flambé.
customerGuidance: Opa! Crispy, melty fried cheese with a tableside flambé. (Family style only).

name: Baked Vegetables - Briam - Thinly sliced vegetable medley, seasoned and baked till lightly charred
description: Briam is a traditional Greek roasted vegetable dish. It consists of a medley of summer vegetables, such as potatoes, zucchini, eggplant, tomatoes, and onions, thinly sliced or chunked, generously drizzled with olive oil, seasoned with herbs (especially oregano), and baked until tender and slightly charred.
preparationNotes: A hearty medley of roasted Mediterranean vegetables baked in olive oil and herbs.
customerGuidance: Deliciously roasted Greek vegetable medley, simple and flavorful.

name: Salata Horiatiki - A mix of tomatoes, cucumber, onion, green pepper, feta, and olives, dressed with oil and vinegar
description: Horiatiki Salata, or Greek Village Salad, is a rustic and refreshing salad featuring chunks of ripe tomatoes, crisp cucumber, sliced red onion, green bell pepper, Kalamata olives, and a generous slab or crumbles of feta cheese. It's dressed simply with quality extra virgin olive oil, a splash of red wine vinegar, and a sprinkle of dried oregano.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (red wine vinegar, olives may contain)
preparationNotes: The classic Greek salad with fresh vegetables, olives, feta, and a simple oil/vinegar dressing.
customerGuidance: A truly authentic and refreshing Greek village salad.

name: Lahanosalata (Greek Coleslaw) - Green and red shredded cabbage, grated carrots, olive oil and lemon juice
description: Lahanosalata is a simple and refreshing Greek cabbage salad, akin to a light coleslaw but typically without mayonnaise. It features finely shredded green and/or red cabbage, often with grated carrots, dressed with extra virgin olive oil and fresh lemon juice, and sometimes includes herbs like dill or parsley.
preparationNotes: A light and tangy Greek cabbage salad with an olive oil and lemon dressing.
customerGuidance: Crisp and refreshing Greek-style coleslaw.

name: Maroulosalata (Greek Romaine Salad) - Shredded romaine lettuce, scallions, mixed herbs, olive oil, lemon juice
description: Maroulosalata is a delicate and refreshing Greek salad made with finely shredded romaine lettuce, fresh scallions (spring onions), and an abundance of fresh dill and sometimes other mixed herbs. It's dressed very simply with extra virgin olive oil and fresh lemon juice.
preparationNotes: A light and refreshing salad of shredded romaine, scallions, and fresh herbs with a lemon-oil dressing.
customerGuidance: Delicate Greek romaine salad with fresh herbs and a zesty dressing.

name: Patatosalata - Warm potato salad with sliced red onions, Kalamata olives, parsley and extra virgin olive oil
description: A Greek-style potato salad (Patatosalata) typically served warm or at room temperature. It features boiled or steamed potatoes tossed with sliced red onions, Kalamata olives, fresh parsley, and a generous dressing of extra virgin olive oil and often lemon juice or red wine vinegar. Unlike American potato salad, it does not usually contain mayonnaise.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if vinegar or some olives used)
preparationNotes: Warm potato salad with red onions, olives, parsley, and an olive oil based dressing.
customerGuidance: Hearty and flavorful Greek potato salad, served warm.

name: Dakos Bread Salad - Fresh tomatoes, barley rusks, feta, capers, onion, oregano, and basil
description: Dakos (or Ntakos) is a traditional Cretan salad or meze. It features a base of Paximadia (hard barley rusks) that are lightly moistened, then topped with grated or chopped fresh tomatoes, crumbled feta or mizithra cheese, capers, red onion, olives (often), and fresh herbs like oregano and basil, all drizzled with extra virgin olive oil.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (barley rusks often contain wheat flour as well)
preparationNotes: A Cretan salad built on barley rusks, topped with tomatoes, feta, and herbs. Contains gluten and dairy.
customerGuidance: A hearty and flavorful Cretan bread salad with fresh toppings.

name: Tabouli - Chopped parsley, cous-cous, tomato, cucumber, mint, red onion and lemon-tahini dressing
description: A refreshing Middle Eastern-inspired salad made with finely chopped parsley as the primary ingredient, mixed with couscous (as specified, though traditional tabouli uses bulgur), diced tomatoes, cucumber, fresh mint, and red onion. This version is tossed in a creamy and zesty lemon-tahini dressing.
preparationNotes: A vibrant parsley and couscous salad (note: couscous instead of traditional bulgur) with a creamy lemon-tahini dressing. Contains wheat and sesame.
customerGuidance: A refreshing herb-packed salad with couscous and lemon-tahini dressing.

name: Tzatziki - Yogurt, garlic, cucumber, herbs
description: A classic Greek and Middle Eastern dip or sauce made from strained yogurt, grated or finely diced cucumber, minced garlic, olive oil, and fresh herbs such as dill or mint. Often includes lemon juice.
preparationNotes: A refreshing yogurt and cucumber dip. Contains dairy.
customerGuidance: Cool, creamy, and refreshing Greek yogurt dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

name: Melitzanosalata - Eggplant, garlic, tahini, cilantro
description: A flavorful roasted eggplant dip. This version combines smoky roasted eggplant pulp with garlic, tahini for added creaminess, fresh cilantro for a distinct herbal note, lemon juice, and olive oil.
preparationNotes: Smoky roasted eggplant dip with tahini and fresh cilantro. Contains sesame.
customerGuidance: Smoky eggplant dip with a creamy texture from tahini and a fresh cilantro twist. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

name: Spicy Feta - Feta cheese puree with spicy peppers
description: Known as Tirokafteri in Greek, this is a zesty and creamy dip made from puréed or crumbled feta cheese blended with spicy peppers (such as hot chili peppers or roasted red peppers with a kick), olive oil, and sometimes a touch of yogurt or red wine vinegar.
preparationNotes: A creamy and spicy feta cheese dip. Contains dairy.
customerGuidance: Creamy, tangy, and spicy feta cheese spread. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

name: Taramasalata - Cod roe, potato, extra virgin olive oil
description: A traditional Greek meze dip made from tarama (salted and cured fish roe, typically from cod, carp, or mullet), emulsified with either bread or potato, extra virgin olive oil, and lemon juice to create a creamy, savory spread.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (if bread is used as emulsifier instead of potato, please inquire)
preparationNotes: A creamy dip made from cured fish roe. This version uses potato. Confirm if bread is used as an alternative for gluten concerns.
customerGuidance: Unique and savory cured fish roe dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

name: Beet Hummus - Roasted beets, chickpea, garlic, tahini, evoo
description: A vibrant and earthy variation of traditional hummus, where roasted beets are blended with chickpeas, tahini (sesame paste), garlic, lemon juice, and extra virgin olive oil (EVOO).
preparationNotes: A colorful and flavorful hummus variant with roasted beets. Contains sesame.
customerGuidance: Vibrant beet hummus, both earthy and tangy. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

name: Pork Tenderloin
description: A lean, tender, and flavorful cut of pork, typically roasted, grilled, or pan-seared. Offered as a versatile protein choice, prepared to highlight its natural taste.
preparationNotes: Simply prepared pork tenderloin. Please inquire about any specific marinades or glazes used for today's preparation.
customerGuidance: Lean and tender pork tenderloin, a versatile protein choice. (Values per 100g cooked serving).

name: Beef Tenderloin
description: A prime cut of beef known for its exceptional tenderness, typically grilled, roasted, or pan-seared. Offered as a premium protein choice.
preparationNotes: Simply prepared beef tenderloin. Please inquire about any specific marinades or sauces used today.
customerGuidance: Exceptionally tender beef tenderloin. (Values per 100g cooked serving).

name: Beef Flank
description: A lean and flavorful cut of beef, known for its robust taste. Typically grilled or broiled and often sliced against the grain. Offered as a protein option.
preparationNotes: Flavorful beef flank steak. Please inquire about any specific marinades used today (e.g., soy sauce in some marinades could add wheat/soy allergens).
customerGuidance: Lean and flavorful beef flank. (Values per 100g cooked serving).

name: Lamb
description: Tender and flavorful lamb, prepared simply (e.g., grilled, roasted) to highlight its distinct taste. Offered as a protein option. Specific cut may vary (e.g., chops, cubed, ground).
preparationNotes: Simply prepared lamb. Please inquire about the specific cut and any marinades used today.
customerGuidance: Flavorful lamb protein option. (Values for generic cooked lamb, 100g serving).

name: Swordfish
description: A firm, meaty, and mild-flavored fish, typically grilled or pan-seared. Offered as a protein option.
preparationNotes: Simply prepared swordfish steak. Please inquire about any specific marinades or sauces used today.
customerGuidance: Firm and meaty swordfish steak. (Values per 100g cooked serving).

name: Bacon wrapped Asparagus
description: Fresh asparagus spears wrapped in savory bacon strips, then typically roasted, grilled, or pan-fried until the bacon is crispy and the asparagus is tender-crisp.
preparationNotes: Asparagus spears wrapped in bacon and cooked until bacon is crisp.
customerGuidance: A classic pairing of tender asparagus and crispy bacon. (Values per approx. 3-4 spears).

name: Mushrooms
description: Fresh mushrooms, typically sautéed, grilled, or roasted. Offered as a side dish, topping, or ingredient.
preparationNotes: Simply prepared mushrooms. Please inquire if cooked with butter for dairy concerns. Vegan if cooked with oil.
customerGuidance: Earthy and savory mushrooms. (Values per 1/2 cup cooked serving).

name: Tomato & Gnocchi- with pesto
description: Soft potato gnocchi served with fresh tomatoes (such as cherry or diced) and a vibrant basil pesto sauce. A flavorful vegetarian pasta dish.
preparationNotes: Soft potato gnocchi tossed with tomatoes and basil pesto. Contains wheat, dairy, and pine nuts. Egg is commonly used in gnocchi.
customerGuidance: A delightful dish of soft gnocchi, fresh tomatoes, and aromatic pesto.

name: Mixed Vegetables
description: A medley of seasonal vegetables, typically steamed, roasted, sautéed, or grilled. A simple and healthy side option.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if cooked with butter, please inquire)
preparationNotes: A simple mix of cooked vegetables. Confirm preparation if dairy is a concern (butter vs. oil).
customerGuidance: A healthy assortment of cooked seasonal vegetables. (Values per 1 cup serving, lightly seasoned).

name: Falafel
description: Crispy, deep-fried balls or patties made from ground chickpeas (or fava beans), fresh herbs like parsley and cilantro, and spices. A popular Middle Eastern street food.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (potentially, if flour is used as a binder, please inquire)
preparationNotes: Deep-fried spiced chickpea patties. Often gluten-free, but please confirm if flour is used in the mixture.
customerGuidance: Crispy and flavorful chickpea fritters. (Values per falafel ball).

name: Yellow Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful rice dish, typically made with long-grain white rice cooked in broth with spices that impart a yellow color, such as turmeric or saffron. Often includes sautéed onions and sometimes other vegetables or aromatics.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if butter is used, please inquire)
preparationNotes: Rice pilaf with a yellow hue from spices like turmeric or saffron. Vegan if prepared with vegetable broth and oil instead of butter.
customerGuidance: Aromatic yellow rice pilaf, a versatile side. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Wild Rice and Mushroom Pilaf
description: A savory and earthy pilaf featuring nutty wild rice cooked with sautéed mushrooms, onions, garlic, herbs, and broth. Often includes other grains or aromatics.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if butter is used, please inquire)
preparationNotes: Nutty wild rice pilaf with savory mushrooms. Vegan if prepared with vegetable broth and oil instead of butter.
customerGuidance: Earthy and flavorful wild rice and mushroom pilaf. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Patatas Bravas
description: A classic Spanish tapas dish consisting of white potatoes that have been cut into irregular shapes of about 2 centimeters, then fried in oil and served warm with a spicy tomato-based 'salsa brava' and often a garlic aioli.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_EGG (if served with traditional aioli, please inquire)
CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if vinegar is used in salsa/aioli)
preparationNotes: Crispy fried potatoes with a spicy tomato sauce (salsa brava). Often served with garlic aioli (contains egg). Vegan if aioli is omitted or a vegan version is used.
suitableForDiets: VEGAN_DIET (without aioli or with vegan aioli)
customerGuidance: A Spanish classic: crispy potatoes with a zesty, spicy tomato sauce.

name: Potato Croquettes
description: Mashed potatoes, often mixed with cheese, herbs, or other flavorings, shaped into small logs or balls, coated in breadcrumbs, and deep-fried until golden and crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if cheese or butter/milk in mashed potatoes is used)
preparationNotes: Crispy fried mashed potato balls or logs. Contain wheat and egg. Usually contain dairy from cheese or mashed potato preparation; please inquire.
customerGuidance: Crispy on the outside, soft and fluffy potato croquettes. (Values per croquette).

name: Roasted beets
description: Beets, typically peeled and cut, tossed with olive oil, salt, and pepper, then roasted until tender and their natural sweetness is concentrated. May be served warm or cold.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if balsamic glaze is used and contains sulphites, please inquire)
preparationNotes: Simply roasted beets, highlighting their natural sweetness. Check if any glazes are added.
customerGuidance: Sweet and earthy roasted beets. (Values per 1/2 cup serving).

name: Fattoush
description: A Levantine bread salad made from toasted or fried pieces of khubz (Arabic flatbread) combined with mixed greens and other vegetables, such as tomatoes, cucumbers, and radishes. It's typically seasoned with sumac, olive oil, and lemon juice.
preparationNotes: A tangy and crunchy Levantine salad with toasted pita bread and sumac dressing. Contains wheat.
customerGuidance: A refreshing and zesty bread salad with crisp vegetables.

name: Cous-cous
description: Small steamed balls of crushed durum wheat semolina, traditionally served with a stew spooned on top or as a simple side dish. This refers to plain prepared couscous.
preparationNotes: Plain steamed couscous. Contains wheat. Vegan if prepared without butter.
customerGuidance: Light and fluffy plain couscous. (Values per 1 cup cooked serving).

name: Lebanese Potato Salad
description: A refreshing Middle Eastern potato salad, typically made with boiled potatoes, fresh parsley, mint, lemon juice, and olive oil. Unlike many Western versions, it does not contain mayonnaise.
preparationNotes: A light and herb-filled potato salad with a lemon-oil dressing. No mayonnaise.
customerGuidance: Refreshing Lebanese-style potato salad with fresh herbs.

name: Tomato - Cucumber salad
description: A simple and refreshing salad made with diced or sliced tomatoes and cucumbers, often with red onion, and a light dressing of olive oil, vinegar or lemon juice, and fresh herbs like parsley or dill.
preparationNotes: A light and crisp salad of tomatoes and cucumbers with a simple dressing.
customerGuidance: Simple, crisp, and refreshing tomato and cucumber salad.

name: Caprese pasta salad
description: A delightful pasta salad inspired by the classic Caprese salad, featuring cooked pasta (often rotini or farfalle) tossed with fresh mozzarella pearls or cubes, cherry or grape tomatoes (often halved), fresh basil leaves, and a light dressing of olive oil and balsamic glaze or vinaigrette.
