preparationNotes: Pasta salad with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil. Contains wheat and dairy.
customerGuidance: Fresh and flavorful Caprese-inspired pasta salad.

name: Baba Ghanoush
description: A Levantine appetizer consisting of finely chopped roasted eggplant, olive oil, lemon juice, various seasonings, and tahini. The eggplant is typically baked or broiled over an open flame before peeling, so that the pulp is soft and has a smoky taste.
preparationNotes: Smoky and creamy roasted eggplant dip with tahini. Contains sesame.
customerGuidance: Rich, smoky, and creamy eggplant dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

name: Muhammara
description: A rich, savory, and slightly tangy Middle Eastern dip made primarily from roasted red peppers, ground walnuts, breadcrumbs, and pomegranate molasses, often seasoned with garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, and spices like cumin and red pepper flakes.
preparationNotes: A robust dip with a unique sweet, tangy, nutty, and slightly spicy flavor profile. Contains walnuts and wheat.
customerGuidance: Savory roasted red pepper and walnut dip with a hint of pomegranate. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

name: Lebanese garlic dip
description: Toum is a potent and cloud-like Lebanese garlic dip, resembling mayonnaise in texture but entirely egg-free. It's a traditional emulsion of fresh garlic, a neutral oil (like sunflower or canola), lemon juice, and salt, whipped to a fluffy consistency.
preparationNotes: An intensely garlicky and fluffy dip, naturally vegan. Known for its strong garlic punch.
suitableForDiets: KETO_FRIENDLY (due to high fat, low carb)
customerGuidance: Intensely flavorful and creamy Lebanese garlic whip. A little goes a long way! (Values per 1 tbsp serving).

name: Pan-Seared Salmon with a Delicate Lemon-Dill Sauce
description: Succulent salmon fillet, pan-seared to achieve a crispy skin and moist interior, served with a light and refreshing lemon-dill sauce, often made with butter, white wine, fresh dill, and lemon.
preparationNotes: Pan-seared salmon with a buttery lemon-dill sauce. Contains dairy and potentially sulphites from wine.
customerGuidance: Perfectly seared salmon with a bright and herbaceous lemon-dill sauce.

name: Roasted Rosemary & Garlic Potatoes
description: Potatoes, typically quartered or wedged, tossed with olive oil, fresh rosemary, minced garlic, salt, and pepper, then roasted until golden brown, crispy on the outside, and fluffy on the inside.
preparationNotes: Crispy and aromatic roasted potatoes with rosemary and garlic.
customerGuidance: Classic roasted potatoes infused with rosemary and garlic. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Grilled Asparagus spears with Shaved Parmesan
description: Fresh asparagus spears, lightly grilled until tender-crisp and slightly charred, then topped with delicate shavings of Parmesan cheese and often a drizzle of olive oil or a squeeze of lemon.
preparationNotes: Grilled asparagus topped with shaved Parmesan. Contains dairy.
customerGuidance: Tender-crisp grilled asparagus elevated with savory Parmesan. (Values per serving, approx 100-150g).

name: Creamy Saffron Risotto Milanese
description: A classic Northern Italian risotto dish from Milan, known for its vibrant yellow color from saffron threads. Made with Arborio or Carnaroli rice, slowly cooked in broth, and enriched with butter, Parmesan cheese, and often white wine and beef bone marrow (though marrow is less common in many modern recipes).
category: Side Dish / Main Course - Vegetarian (if veg broth)
preparationNotes: Rich and creamy saffron-infused risotto. Contains dairy. Vegetarian if made with vegetable broth and without bone marrow; please inquire.
customerGuidance: Luxurious and aromatic saffron risotto from Milan. (Values per serving).

name: Sautéed Garlic Broccolini with a hint of chili
description: Tender broccolini (baby broccoli) sautéed with minced garlic in olive oil, seasoned with salt, pepper, and a subtle hint of red chili flakes for a touch of warmth.
preparationNotes: Broccolini sautéed with garlic and a touch of chili heat.
customerGuidance: Tender-crisp garlic broccolini with a slight chili kick. (Values per serving).

name: Penne alla Vodka with a Creamy Tomato Sauce
description: A classic Italian-American pasta dish featuring penne pasta tossed in a rich and creamy tomato sauce that is brightened with a splash of vodka, often finished with Parmesan cheese and fresh basil or parsley.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (cream, Parmesan cheese, butter if used)
preparationNotes: Penne pasta in a creamy tomato sauce with a hint of vodka. Contains wheat and dairy. Alcohol is cooked but trace amounts might remain.
customerGuidance: A rich and satisfying pasta dish with a velvety vodka-infused tomato cream sauce.

name: Fettuccine Alfredo enhanced with Black Truffle Oil
description: A luxurious take on the classic Fettuccine Alfredo. Fresh fettuccine pasta is coated in a rich and creamy sauce made from butter, heavy cream, and Parmesan cheese, elevated with the aromatic essence of black truffle oil.
preparationNotes: Indulgent fettuccine in a creamy Alfredo sauce with black truffle oil. Contains wheat, egg, and dairy.
customerGuidance: An exceptionally rich and aromatic truffle Alfredo pasta experience.

name: Lobster Ravioli in a Delicate Saffron Cream Sauce
description: Elegant lobster-filled ravioli served in a luxurious and delicately flavored saffron cream sauce, often garnished with fresh herbs.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (ravioli pasta, potentially breadcrumbs in filling)
CONTAINS_DAIRY (cream, butter, Parmesan, potentially cheese in filling)
preparationNotes: Lobster-filled ravioli in a saffron cream sauce. Contains shellfish, wheat, egg, and dairy. Please inquire about specific filling ingredients for additional allergens.
customerGuidance: An exquisite dish of lobster ravioli with a fragrant saffron cream sauce.

name: Classic Caesar Salad with Homemade Croutons & Parmesan Crisps
description: A timeless Caesar salad featuring crisp romaine lettuce, crunchy homemade croutons, and savory Parmesan crisps, all tossed in a traditional creamy Caesar dressing (typically made with egg yolk, anchovies, garlic, Dijon, lemon juice, and olive oil).
preparationNotes: Classic Caesar salad enhanced with homemade croutons and Parmesan crisps. Contains wheat, dairy, egg, and fish. Inquire about specific dressing ingredients.
customerGuidance: An elevated Caesar salad with homemade touches for extra crunch and flavor.

name: Vine-Ripened Tomato & Fresh Mozzarella Caprese with Balsamic Glaze
description: A simple Italian salad, made of sliced fresh mozzarella, ripe vine-ripened tomatoes, and sweet basil, seasoned with salt and olive oil, and finished with a drizzle of rich balsamic glaze.
preparationNotes: Classic Caprese salad with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, basil, and balsamic glaze. Contains dairy and sulphites.
customerGuidance: A fresh and elegant display of Italian flavors.

name: Arugula Salad with Sliced Pear, Gorgonzola, and Candied Walnuts
description: A sophisticated salad featuring peppery arugula greens, sweet sliced ripe pears, pungent Gorgonzola cheese crumbles, and crunchy candied walnuts, often tossed in a light vinaigrette dressing.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (Gorgonzola cheese, butter in candied walnuts if used)
CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if balsamic vinegar or some Dijon mustards used)
preparationNotes: Arugula salad with a balance of sweet, savory, and peppery flavors. Contains dairy and walnuts. Inquire about candied walnut preparation for dairy details.
customerGuidance: An elegant salad with contrasting flavors and textures.

name: Chipotle Chicken Tinga
description: A traditional Mexican dish made with shredded chicken simmered in a smoky, spicy tomato sauce flavored with chipotle peppers in adobo, onions, and garlic. Often served in tacos, tostadas, or as a filling.
preparationNotes: Shredded chicken in a smoky chipotle tomato sauce. Check adobo sauce for specific soy/wheat content.
customerGuidance: Smoky and spicy shredded chipotle chicken. (Values per 1/2 cup serving).

name: Grilled Mahi-Mahi with lime
description: Firm, white-fleshed Mahi-Mahi fillets, grilled until tender and flaky, served with a zesty touch of fresh lime. A light and healthy seafood option.
preparationNotes: Grilled Mahi-Mahi seasoned with lime. A simple and healthy preparation.
customerGuidance: Light and flaky grilled Mahi-Mahi with a refreshing lime accent. (Values per 150g serving).

name: Garlic-Lime Sautéed Shrimp
description: Succulent shrimp quickly sautéed in olive oil or butter with minced garlic and a generous squeeze of fresh lime juice, often finished with fresh cilantro or parsley.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if cooked with butter, please inquire)
preparationNotes: Shrimp sautéed with garlic and lime. Ask if butter is used if dairy is a concern.
customerGuidance: Zesty and flavorful garlic-lime shrimp. (Values per 100g serving).

name: Adobo Spiced Tofu Crumbles (Vegan)
description: Firm tofu, crumbled and seasoned with a savory and tangy adobo spice blend (typically including paprika, oregano, garlic powder, onion powder, and sometimes chili powder or cumin), then pan-fried or baked until slightly browned. A versatile vegan protein.
preparationNotes: Flavorful adobo-spiced tofu crumbles. Ensure adobo seasoning is free from unwanted additives if concerned.
customerGuidance: Savory and versatile adobo-spiced tofu crumbles. (Values per 1/2 cup serving).

name: Colorful Roasted Fajita Vegetables (Vegan)
description: A vibrant mix of bell peppers (various colors) and onions, sliced and roasted with olive oil and classic fajita seasonings like chili powder and cumin, until tender-crisp and slightly caramelized. A perfect vegan accompaniment or filling.
preparationNotes: Sweet and smoky roasted bell peppers and onions for fajitas.
customerGuidance: Colorful and flavorful roasted vegetables, perfect for fajitas or as a side. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Cuban-Style Black Beans and Rice
description: A staple Cuban dish (Moros y Cristianos if cooked together, or separately as Arroz con Frijoles Negros) featuring fluffy white rice served with savory, seasoned black beans. The beans are typically cooked with onions, garlic, bell peppers, cumin, oregano, and bay leaf.
preparationNotes: Classic Cuban black beans and rice, a hearty and flavorful combination.
customerGuidance: Comforting and nutritious Cuban-style black beans served with rice. (Values per large serving).

name: Grilled Vegetable Medley with balsamic glaze
description: An assortment of seasonal vegetables (such as zucchini, bell peppers, eggplant, asparagus, onions) grilled until tender-crisp and lightly charred, then drizzled with a sweet and tangy balsamic glaze.
preparationNotes: Grilled vegetables finished with a balsamic glaze. Contains sulphites.
customerGuidance: Smoky grilled vegetables enhanced with a sweet balsamic glaze. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Mango, Jicama & Cabbage Slaw with lime dressing
description: A refreshing and crunchy slaw featuring sweet mango, crisp jicama, and shredded cabbage (often red and green), all tossed in a zesty lime dressing, typically with cilantro and a hint of spice.
preparationNotes: A vibrant and crunchy slaw with tropical notes and a tangy lime dressing.
suitableForDiets: PALEO_FRIENDLY (if no added sugar in dressing)
customerGuidance: Refreshing slaw with sweet mango, crisp jicama, and a zesty lime kick. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Sweet & Spicy Mango-Habanero Salsa
description: A vibrant salsa balancing the sweetness of ripe mangoes with the intense heat of habanero peppers, typically mixed with red onion, cilantro, lime juice, and a touch of salt.
preparationNotes: A fiery salsa with sweet mango and very spicy habanero peppers. Use with caution.
customerGuidance: Intensely spicy habanero salsa balanced with sweet mango. Very hot! (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

name: Roasted Corn & Black Bean Salsa
description: A hearty and flavorful salsa featuring sweet roasted corn kernels, black beans, diced red onion, bell peppers (often red or green), jalapeño (optional), fresh cilantro, and a lime vinaigrette or simple lime juice dressing.
preparationNotes: A colorful and textured salsa with roasted corn and black beans.
customerGuidance: Sweet roasted corn and black beans in a zesty salsa. (Values per 1/4 cup serving).

name: Cool Avocado Crema
description: A smooth and creamy sauce or drizzle made from ripe avocados blended with lime juice, cilantro, and often sour cream or Greek yogurt for extra creaminess and tang. Salt and sometimes a touch of garlic or jalapeño are added.
preparationNotes: Creamy avocado sauce, typically made with sour cream or yogurt. Contains dairy.
customerGuidance: Smooth and refreshing avocado crema, perfect for topping. (Values per 1 tbsp serving).

name: Creamy Chipotle Salsa
description: A smoky and spicy salsa with a creamy texture, often achieved by blending roasted tomatoes, chipotle peppers in adobo, garlic, onion, and sometimes sour cream, mayonnaise, or a neutral oil for emulsification.
preparationNotes: Smoky and creamy chipotle salsa. Likely contains dairy or egg for creaminess; please inquire for specifics and other potential adobo allergens.
customerGuidance: Smoky, spicy, and creamy chipotle salsa. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

name: Mexican Shredded Cheese Blend
description: A blend of shredded cheeses commonly used in Mexican cuisine, typically including varieties like Monterey Jack, Cheddar, Asadero, or Queso Quesadilla. Melts well and adds a creamy, savory flavor.
dietaryFlags: VEGETARIAN_OPTION (most cheese rennet is microbial, but worth checking if strict)
preparationNotes: A blend of shredded cheeses suitable for melting. Contains dairy.
customerGuidance: A classic blend of Mexican-style shredded cheeses. (Values per 1/4 cup serving).

name: Diced White Onions & Fresh Cilantro Mix
description: A simple, fresh, and aromatic mixture of finely diced white onions and chopped fresh cilantro. A common garnish in Mexican and other cuisines, adding a bright, pungent crunch.
preparationNotes: A fresh mix of diced white onions and cilantro.
customerGuidance: Classic fresh topping of diced onions and cilantro. (Values per 1 tbsp serving).

name: Pickled Jalapeño Slices
description: Jalapeño peppers sliced and pickled in a brine of vinegar, water, salt, and often spices like garlic, oregano, or bay leaves. They offer a tangy, spicy kick.
preparationNotes: Tangy and spicy pickled jalapeño slices. Contains sulphites.
customerGuidance: Add a spicy, tangy kick with these pickled jalapeños. (Values per 1 tbsp serving).

name: Signature Fresh Guacamole
description: A signature, freshly prepared guacamole made from ripe avocados mashed with lime juice, diced onions, chopped cilantro, tomatoes (optional), jalapeños (optional), and salt.
preparationNotes: Freshly made guacamole with classic ingredients.
customerGuidance: Our signature fresh and creamy guacamole. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

name: Fire-Roasted Bell Peppers & Onions
description: A flavorful mix of bell peppers (various colors) and onions, fire-roasted to impart a smoky char and bring out their natural sweetness. Often used as a topping or side.
preparationNotes: Smoky and sweet fire-roasted bell peppers and onions.
customerGuidance: Sweet and smoky roasted peppers and onions. (Values per 1/2 cup serving).

name: Crumbled Cotija Cheese
description: Cotija is a firm, salty, and crumbly Mexican cheese made primarily from cow's milk. It has a strong, savory flavor and is often used as a topping or garnish, similar to Parmesan.
preparationNotes: Salty, crumbly Mexican cheese. Contains dairy.
customerGuidance: Adds a salty, savory finish to dishes. (Values per 1 tbsp serving).

name: Tangy Pickled Red Onions
description: Thinly sliced red onions pickled in a brine of vinegar, water, sugar (optional), and salt, often with spices like peppercorns or bay leaves. They add a bright, tangy, and slightly sweet crunch.
preparationNotes: Bright pink, tangy pickled red onions. Contains sulphites.
customerGuidance: Adds a vibrant tang and crunch. (Values per 1 tbsp serving).

name: Shredded Crisp Lettuce
description: Fresh lettuce, typically iceberg or romaine, finely shredded to provide a cool, crisp texture as a topping or base for various dishes.
preparationNotes: Plain shredded crisp lettuce.
customerGuidance: Cool and crisp shredded lettuce. (Values per 1/2 cup serving).

name: Gourmet Slider Bar (Beef, Chicken, Veggie)
description: A customizable slider bar offering a variety of mini patties (beef, chicken, veggie options) with an assortment of gourmet buns, cheeses, sauces, and toppings for guests to create their own unique sliders.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_NUTS (potentially in some gourmet sauces or veggie patties, please inquire)
preparationNotes: Interactive slider station with various patties and toppings. Dietary suitability depends on choices. Inquire about specific ingredients for patties, buns, and sauces.
customerGuidance: Create your own gourmet sliders! Many options available. (Values per slider, highly variable).

name: Grilled Herb Lamb Chops
description: Tender lamb chops marinated in a blend of fresh herbs (such as rosemary, thyme, oregano), garlic, olive oil, and lemon juice, then grilled to perfection, offering a fragrant char and juicy interior.
preparationNotes: Lamb chops marinated in fresh herbs, garlic, and lemon, then grilled.
customerGuidance: Fragrant and flavorful grilled lamb chops with fresh herbs. (Values per 2-3 chops).

name: Smoked Pork Belly Burnt Ends
description: Cubes of rich pork belly, slow-smoked until tender, then often tossed in a sweet and tangy BBQ sauce or glaze and returned to the smoker or oven to caramelize, creating flavorful 'burnt ends'.
preparationNotes: Tender, smoky, and caramelized cubes of pork belly. Inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Indulgent bites of smoky, caramelized pork belly. (Values per 2-3 pieces/small serving).

name: St. Louis Style Baby Back Ribs
description: St. Louis style ribs are pork spare ribs that have had the breastbone, cartilage and rib tips removed to create a more uniform, rectangular rack. They are meatier than baby backs and are typically slow-cooked (smoked or baked) and glazed with BBQ sauce.
preparationNotes: Meaty St. Louis style pork ribs, slow-cooked and basted with BBQ sauce. Inquire about BBQ sauce for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Tender and flavorful St. Louis style BBQ ribs. (Values per 3-4 rib serving).

name: Signature BBQ Glazed Chicken Quarters
description: Chicken leg quarters (thigh and drumstick), slow-cooked or grilled, and generously basted with a signature sweet, smoky, or tangy BBQ glaze until tender and caramelized.
preparationNotes: Juicy chicken quarters with a signature BBQ glaze. Please inquire about glaze ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Tender chicken quarters smothered in our signature BBQ glaze. (Values per quarter).

name: Herb Rotisserie Chicken
description: Whole chicken seasoned generously with a blend of aromatic herbs (such as rosemary, thyme, oregano), garlic, salt, and pepper, then slow-cooked on a rotisserie for exceptionally moist, tender meat and crispy, flavorful skin.
preparationNotes: Chicken slow-cooked on a rotisserie with an aromatic herb seasoning.
customerGuidance: Juicy and flavorful herb-infused rotisserie chicken. (Values per 100g serving, mixed meat).

name: Jumbo BBQ Prawn Skewers
description: Large, succulent jumbo prawns (shrimp) threaded onto skewers, marinated or basted with a flavorful barbecue sauce, then grilled until perfectly cooked with a slight char.
preparationNotes: Jumbo prawns grilled on skewers with BBQ sauce. Please inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Plump and flavorful jumbo BBQ prawn skewers. (Values per skewer, approx 3-4 prawns).

name: Cedar Plank Roasted Salmon with dill
description: Salmon fillet roasted on a cedar plank, which infuses the fish with a unique smoky flavor. Typically seasoned simply with salt, pepper, lemon, and fresh dill to complement the cedar notes.
preparationNotes: Salmon roasted on a cedar plank for a smoky flavor, seasoned with dill.
customerGuidance: Aromatic cedar plank salmon with a delicate dill accent. (Values per 150-180g serving).

name: Smoky BBQ Tofu Skewers (Vegan)
description: Firm tofu cubes marinated in a smoky barbecue sauce, threaded onto skewers (often with vegetables like bell peppers and onions), and grilled or baked until caramelized and flavorful. A satisfying vegan BBQ option.
preparationNotes: Tofu skewers with smoky BBQ sauce. Please inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns (wheat/soy).
customerGuidance: Deliciously smoky and savory BBQ tofu skewers. (Values per 2 skewers).

name: Smoky Pit Baked Beans with bacon bits
description: Classic baked beans slow-cooked with a deep, smoky flavor reminiscent of pit barbecue, enriched with molasses, brown sugar, spices, and savory bacon bits for added taste and texture.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SOY (potentially in Worcestershire or bacon bits)
preparationNotes: Slow-cooked baked beans with a smoky flavor and bacon. Check Worcestershire/bacon bits for allergens.
customerGuidance: Rich, smoky, and savory pit-style baked beans with bacon. (Values per 1 cup serving).

name: Creamy Three-Cheese Mac n' Cheese Bake
description: An indulgent baked macaroni and cheese made with a blend of three cheeses (such as cheddar, Gruyère, and Parmesan) creating an extra creamy and flavorful sauce, often topped with breadcrumbs for a crispy finish.
preparationNotes: Extra creamy baked macaroni and cheese with a blend of three cheeses. Contains wheat and dairy.
customerGuidance: The ultimate comfort food: a rich and creamy three-cheese mac n' cheese. (Values per generous serving).

name: Loaded Baked Potato Bar with all the fixings
description: A customizable offering featuring fluffy baked potatoes and a variety of popular toppings such as cheese, bacon bits, sour cream, chives, chili, and butter, allowing guests to create their perfect loaded potato.
allergenAlerts: Base potato is allergen-free. Toppings may introduce: CONTAINS_DAIRY (cheese, sour cream, butter), CONTAINS_SOY (some chili or bacon bits). Specific allergens depend on selected toppings.
preparationNotes: Guests can customize their baked potato from a selection of toppings. Dietary suitability depends on choices made.
customerGuidance: Create your own loaded baked potato! Nutritional info for plain potato; toppings will add to values.

name: Garlic Herb Mashed Potatoes
description: Creamy mashed potatoes infused with roasted garlic and a blend of fresh herbs like parsley, chives, and thyme.
preparationNotes: Smooth and flavorful mashed potatoes with aromatic garlic and herbs.
customerGuidance: Creamy, garlicky, and herbaceous mashed potatoes.

name: Crispy Mini Smashed Potatoes with rosemary
description: Small potatoes that are boiled, smashed flat, then roasted or fried until crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, seasoned with fresh rosemary and sea salt.
preparationNotes: Boiled then roasted or fried for a crispy exterior and fluffy interior, flavored with rosemary.
customerGuidance: Deliciously crispy smashed potatoes with aromatic rosemary.

name: Twice Baked Potatoes with Cheddar & Chives
description: Baked potato skins filled with a mixture of mashed potato pulp, cheddar cheese, sour cream, butter, and chives, then baked again until golden and bubbly.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (cheddar cheese, sour cream, butter, milk)
preparationNotes: Fluffy potato filling mixed with cheese and chives, stuffed back into potato skins and baked.
customerGuidance: Cheesy and savory twice-baked potatoes, a comforting classic.

name: Sweet Grilled Corn on the Cob with flavored butters
description: Fresh sweet corn grilled to perfection, achieving a smoky char and enhanced sweetness, served with a selection of flavored butters (e.g., herb, chili-lime, garlic).
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (flavored butters). Plain grilled corn available upon request for dairy-free/vegan.
preparationNotes: Smoky grilled corn, served with various compound butters. Confirm butter ingredients for specific allergens.
customerGuidance: Sweet and smoky grilled corn, choose your flavored butter! (Nutritional info for corn with light butter)

name: Southern Style Creamed Corn
description: A comforting Southern side dish made from sweet corn kernels simmered in a rich, creamy sauce, often with butter, cream, and sometimes a touch of sugar or bacon.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if flour used as thickener)
preparationNotes: Sweet corn in a rich, creamy sauce. May contain bacon or flour; please inquire.
customerGuidance: Rich and creamy Southern-style corn, a true comfort food.

name: Bacon-Wrapped Jalapeño Poppers
description: Jalapeño peppers stuffed with a creamy cheese filling (often cream cheese and cheddar), wrapped in bacon, and then baked or grilled until crispy.
preparationNotes: Spicy jalapeños filled with cheese and wrapped in crispy bacon.
customerGuidance: Spicy, cheesy, and smoky bacon-wrapped delights. (Nutritional info per popper)

name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts with Maple-Balsamic Glaze
description: Brussels sprouts roasted until tender and slightly caramelized, then tossed in a sweet and tangy glaze made from maple syrup and balsamic vinegar.
preparationNotes: Caramelized roasted Brussels sprouts with a balanced sweet and acidic glaze.
customerGuidance: Sweet, tangy, and perfectly roasted Brussels sprouts.

name: Classic Buttermilk Cornbread Muffins
description: Moist and tender cornbread muffins made with buttermilk, offering a slightly tangy flavor and a delightful crumb. Perfect accompaniment to many meals.
preparationNotes: Traditional cornbread muffins with a tender crumb from buttermilk.
customerGuidance: Moist and flavorful buttermilk cornbread muffins.

name: Cheddar Jalapeño Cornbread
description: A savory take on classic cornbread, featuring sharp cheddar cheese and spicy diced jalapeños baked into the bread for a flavorful kick.
preparationNotes: Savory cornbread with melted cheddar and bits of spicy jalapeño.
customerGuidance: Cheesy and spicy jalapeño cornbread with a kick.

name: Medley of Grilled Seasonal Vegetables
description: A colorful assortment of fresh seasonal vegetables, such as bell peppers, zucchini, yellow squash, asparagus, and onions, lightly seasoned and grilled to bring out their natural sweetness and smoky flavor.
preparationNotes: Simply grilled fresh vegetables, highlighting seasonal availability.
customerGuidance: Fresh and healthy grilled seasonal vegetables with a hint of smoke.

name: Grilled Asparagus with Lemon Zest
description: Tender-crisp asparagus spears grilled and brightened with a touch of fresh lemon zest and a drizzle of olive oil.
preparationNotes: Simply grilled asparagus with a fresh citrus finish.
customerGuidance: Light and flavorful grilled asparagus with a hint of lemon.

name: Classic Caesar Salad with garlic croutons
description: A timeless salad of crisp romaine lettuce, shaved Parmesan cheese, and crunchy garlic croutons, all tossed in a creamy, tangy Caesar dressing.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (lemon juice, wine vinegar if used)
preparationNotes: Features crisp romaine, savory Parmesan, and signature garlic croutons with traditional anchovy-based dressing.
customerGuidance: The quintessential Caesar salad with all the classic components.

name: Creamy Country Coleslaw
description: A classic American side featuring finely shredded cabbage and carrots in a rich, creamy, and tangy mayonnaise-based dressing.
preparationNotes: Homestyle coleslaw with a traditional creamy and tangy dressing.
customerGuidance: Classic, cool, and creamy coleslaw, perfect for any gathering.

name: Homestyle Garden Salad with buttermilk ranch
description: A fresh mix of garden greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber slices, and carrot shreds, served with a creamy homestyle buttermilk ranch dressing.
preparationNotes: Crisp garden vegetables paired with a classic creamy buttermilk ranch dressing.
customerGuidance: A refreshing garden salad with our popular buttermilk ranch. (Nutritional info includes dressing)

name: Summer Pasta Salad with fresh vegetables
description: A light and refreshing pasta salad featuring chilled rotini or farfalle pasta tossed with a vibrant mix of summer vegetables like cherry tomatoes, bell peppers, cucumbers, and black olives, dressed in a zesty Italian vinaigrette.
preparationNotes: Chilled pasta tossed with crisp summer vegetables and a light vinaigrette.
customerGuidance: Bright and zesty pasta salad, perfect for a summer day.

name: Bacon & Jalapeño Loaded Corn Salad
description: A vibrant corn salad packed with flavor, featuring sweet corn kernels, crispy bacon, spicy jalapeños, red onion, and cilantro, all tossed in a creamy, tangy dressing.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (sour cream/Greek yogurt/cotija cheese in dressing or as topping)
preparationNotes: A creamy corn salad with a smoky, spicy, and savory kick.
customerGuidance: Flavor-packed corn salad with bacon, jalapeño, and a creamy dressing.

name: Classic Iceberg Wedge Salad with blue cheese & bacon
description: A crisp wedge of iceberg lettuce generously topped with creamy blue cheese dressing, crispy bacon bits, diced tomatoes, and sometimes red onion.
preparationNotes: A refreshing and indulgent salad with a cool, crisp texture and rich toppings.
customerGuidance: The iconic wedge salad: crisp lettuce, creamy blue cheese, and smoky bacon.

name: Refreshing Cucumber Dill Salad
description: Thinly sliced cucumbers and fresh dill tossed in a light and tangy vinaigrette or a creamy yogurt-based dressing for a cool and refreshing side dish.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_DAIRY (if creamy version with yogurt/sour cream)
preparationNotes: Crisp cucumbers with fresh dill. Can be light vinaigrette or creamy style. Please inquire about daily preparation if dairy is a concern.
customerGuidance: Cool and crisp cucumber salad with the fresh taste of dill.

name: Crunchy Asian Slaw with sesame vinaigrette
description: A vibrant slaw packed with shredded cabbage, carrots, bell peppers, and often edamame or peanuts, all tossed in a zesty sesame-ginger vinaigrette for a delightful crunch and Asian-inspired flavors.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (if traditional soy sauce is used)
preparationNotes: Colorful and crunchy with a tangy and savory sesame vinaigrette. Often contains nuts.
customerGuidance: Crisp, colorful Asian-inspired slaw with a nutty sesame dressing.

name: Hearty Cobb Salad with traditional toppings
description: A substantial American salad featuring chopped greens, tomato, crispy bacon, grilled chicken breast, hard-boiled eggs, avocado, blue cheese, and chives, typically served with a red wine vinaigrette.
preparationNotes: A classic main-course salad, loaded with protein and a variety of textures and flavors.
customerGuidance: A satisfying and flavorful salad packed with traditional Cobb ingredients.

name: Creamy Red Bliss Potato Salad
description: A classic potato salad made with tender red bliss potatoes (often with skin on), hard-boiled eggs, celery, and red onion, all mixed in a creamy mayonnaise and mustard dressing.
preparationNotes: Features tender red potatoes in a rich, creamy dressing with traditional mix-ins.
customerGuidance: Classic, creamy potato salad with tender red bliss potatoes.

name: Loaded Macaroni Salad with cheddar and bacon
description: A hearty macaroni salad taken to the next level with additions like shredded cheddar cheese, crispy bacon bits, bell peppers, and celery, all in a creamy seasoned dressing.
preparationNotes: A rich and savory twist on classic macaroni salad, packed with cheese and bacon.
customerGuidance: Extra flavorful macaroni salad loaded with cheddar, bacon, and veggies.

name: Seasonal Fresh Fruit Platter with honey-lime drizzle
description: A beautiful arrangement of the freshest seasonal fruits, such as berries, melon, grapes, and pineapple, enhanced with a light and refreshing honey-lime drizzle.
preparationNotes: A colorful assortment of fresh fruits, brightened with a sweet and tart honey-lime glaze. Not vegan due to honey.
customerGuidance: An refreshing platter of seasonal fruits with a delightful honey-lime touch.

name: Kansas City Sweet & Smoky BBQ Sauce
description: A classic Kansas City style barbecue sauce: thick, rich, tomato-based, with a balance of sweet, tangy, and smoky flavors, often featuring molasses and hickory smoke.
preparationNotes: Quintessential thick, sweet, and smoky BBQ sauce. Check Worcestershire for vegan needs.
customerGuidance: Authentic sweet, smoky, and tangy Kansas City BBQ sauce.

name: Carolina Gold Mustard Tang BBQ Sauce
description: A distinctive South Carolina barbecue sauce with a bright golden color and a tangy, slightly sweet flavor derived from its yellow mustard base, balanced with vinegar and spices.
preparationNotes: A zesty and tangy mustard-based sauce, hallmark of SC barbecue. Vegan status depends on Worcestershire/honey.
customerGuidance: Experience the unique tangy gold of Carolina mustard BBQ sauce.

name: Eastern North Carolina Vinegar Pepper BBQ Sauce
description: A very thin, sharp, and spicy barbecue sauce hailing from Eastern North Carolina, primarily composed of vinegar, crushed red pepper flakes, and other spices, with no tomato.
preparationNotes: Authentically sharp, spicy, and vinegar-forward. Cuts through rich meats beautifully.
customerGuidance: The true taste of Eastern NC: tangy, peppery, and bold vinegar BBQ sauce.

name: Alabama Creamy White BBQ Sauce
description: A distinctive barbecue sauce from Northern Alabama, featuring a mayonnaise base combined with vinegar, horseradish, lemon juice, and black pepper for a tangy, creamy, and peppery profile, especially popular with smoked chicken.
preparationNotes: A unique, zesty, and creamy mayonnaise-based BBQ sauce with a peppery kick.
customerGuidance: Try this tangy and creamy Alabama white BBQ sauce, especially good on chicken.

name: Texas Bold & Peppery BBQ Sauce
description: Reflecting the heart of Texas barbecue, this sauce is typically tomato-based but less sweet than KC style, with a robust, savory flavor, often emphasizing beefy notes, black pepper, and a hint of spice from chili powders or cumin.
preparationNotes: Savory, peppery, and often beef-broth enhanced, this sauce complements smoked meats. May contain beef broth.
customerGuidance: Bold, peppery, and savory Texas-style BBQ sauce, not overly sweet.

name: Raspberry Chipotle BBQ Sauce
description: A tantalizing barbecue sauce that combines the sweetness of raspberries with the smoky heat of chipotle peppers, creating a complex sweet, fruity, and spicy flavor profile.
preparationNotes: A delightful balance of sweet raspberry and smoky chipotle spice. Vegan status depends on Worcestershire/honey.
customerGuidance: Sweet, smoky, and spicy! A unique raspberry chipotle BBQ experience.

name: Sweet Pickle Relish
description: A condiment made from finely chopped pickled cucumbers, sweetened with sugar or corn syrup, and flavored with various spices such as mustard seed and celery seed. Commonly used on hot dogs, hamburgers, and in salads.
preparationNotes: Classic sweet and tangy chopped pickle condiment.
customerGuidance: Familiar sweet pickle relish, great for adding a tangy crunch.

name: Thinly Sliced Red Onions
description: Fresh red onions, thinly sliced, offering a sharp, pungent flavor and crisp texture. Ideal as a topping or ingredient in various dishes.
preparationNotes: Simply fresh, thinly sliced red onions.
customerGuidance: Crisp and pungent thinly sliced red onions.

name: Classic Moussaka with layers of eggplant, meat, and béchamel
description: A rich, baked Greek casserole made with layers of sautéed eggplant, spiced ground meat (typically lamb or beef) cooked in a tomato sauce, and topped with a thick, creamy béchamel sauce.
preparationNotes: A hearty and iconic Greek dish with distinct layers of eggplant, spiced meat, and creamy topping.
customerGuidance: The ultimate Greek comfort food: rich, layered Moussaka.

name: Spanakopita Triangles (Spinach & feta pastries)
description: Savory Greek pastries made with flaky phyllo dough filled with a mixture of spinach, feta cheese, onions, dill, and sometimes egg.
preparationNotes: Crispy, flaky triangles filled with a savory spinach and feta mixture.
customerGuidance: Deliciously flaky Greek spinach and feta pastries. (Nutritional info per triangle)

name: Kritharaki Yiouvetsi (Orzo with tomato sauce)
description: A comforting Greek dish, typically orzo pasta baked in a rich tomato sauce, often with cinnamon and other warm spices. It can be made with meat (like lamb or beef) or as a vegetarian dish.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_DAIRY (if feta topping used)
preparationNotes: Orzo pasta cooked in a savory tomato sauce with hints of cinnamon. Confirm if feta is added.
customerGuidance: Comforting Greek orzo pasta in a rich, spiced tomato sauce.

name: Fasolakia Ladera (Green beans stewed in olive oil & tomato)
description: A traditional Greek vegetarian dish (ladera) featuring fresh green beans braised in olive oil with ripe tomatoes, onions, garlic, and herbs like parsley or dill until tender and flavorful.
preparationNotes: Tender green beans slow-cooked in a rich tomato and olive oil sauce.
customerGuidance: Hearty and flavorful Greek stewed green beans.

name: Grilled Halloumi & Marinated Octopus Skewers
description: Skewers featuring salty, semi-hard halloumi cheese grilled until golden and tender, paired with succulent marinated octopus, offering a delightful contrast of textures and Mediterranean flavors.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SHELLFISH (octopus - though technically a cephalopod, often grouped with shellfish for allergies)
CONTAINS_SULPHITES (lemon juice, wine in marinade if used)
preparationNotes: Grilled skewers with savory halloumi and tender, flavorful octopus.
customerGuidance: A taste of the Mediterranean: grilled halloumi and octopus skewers.

name: Dolmades Yalantzi (Stuffed grape leaves with rice & herbs)
description: A classic Greek meze, 'Dolmades Yalantzi' are tender grape leaves stuffed with a fragrant mixture of rice, onions, fresh herbs like parsley, dill, and mint, and sometimes pine nuts, then simmered in lemon-infused olive oil.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_NUTS (pine nuts). Please inquire if nut-free is required.
preparationNotes: Tender grape leaves filled with an aromatic rice and herb mixture. Usually served cold or at room temperature.
customerGuidance: Delicate and flavorful rice-stuffed grape leaves. (Nutritional info per piece)

name: Beetroot & Yogurt Salad with Walnuts (Patzarosalata)
description: A vibrant Greek salad (Patzarosalata) made with cooked beetroots, creamy Greek yogurt, garlic, a touch of vinegar, and often topped with crunchy walnuts and fresh dill.
preparationNotes: Earthy beetroots balanced by creamy yogurt and crunchy walnuts.
customerGuidance: Vibrant and flavorful Greek beetroot salad with yogurt and walnuts.

name: Pork Tenderloin & Apricot Kebabs with rosemary glaze
description: Succulent pieces of pork tenderloin and sweet dried apricots threaded onto skewers, grilled, and basted with a fragrant rosemary-infused glaze.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SOY (if soy sauce used in glaze)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if soy sauce used in glaze is not tamari)
May contain CONTAINS_HONEY (if used in glaze)
preparationNotes: Tender pork and sweet apricots with an aromatic rosemary glaze. Gluten status depends on glaze.
customerGuidance: Sweet and savory grilled pork and apricot kebabs with a rosemary touch.

name: Lemon-Herb Marinated Chicken Kebabs
description: Tender pieces of chicken breast marinated in a zesty mixture of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and fresh herbs like oregano, thyme, and parsley, then grilled on skewers until perfectly cooked.
preparationNotes: Juicy grilled chicken infused with bright lemon and aromatic herbs.
customerGuidance: Bright, flavorful, and healthy lemon-herb chicken kebabs.

name: Beef Tenderloin & Bell Pepper Kebabs
description: Premium cuts of beef tenderloin and colorful bell pepper chunks marinated and grilled on skewers for a tender, juicy, and flavorful kebab.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SOY (if soy sauce used)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if soy sauce/Worcestershire used)
preparationNotes: Tender, high-quality beef with sweet bell peppers, simply grilled. Gluten status depends on marinade.
customerGuidance: Luxurious and flavorful beef tenderloin and pepper kebabs.

name: Spiced Lamb Kofta Kebabs
description: Ground lamb seasoned with aromatic spices like cumin, coriander, garlic, onion, and fresh herbs (parsley, mint), formed onto skewers and grilled until succulent and flavorful.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_EGG (if used as binder)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if breadcrumbs used as binder)
preparationNotes: Flavorful and aromatic minced lamb kebabs, grilled to perfection. Check for egg/wheat if allergies.
customerGuidance: Aromatic and juicy spiced lamb kofta kebabs.

name: Mediterranean Swordfish Kebabs with olives & capers
description: Firm swordfish steaks cut into chunks, marinated with olive oil, lemon, oregano, garlic, and studded with Kalamata olives and capers, then grilled on skewers for a taste of the Mediterranean Sea.
preparationNotes: Robust swordfish infused with briny olives, capers, and Mediterranean herbs.
customerGuidance: Flavorful and meaty Mediterranean swordfish kebabs.

name: Garlic & Herb Shrimp Skewers
description: Plump shrimp marinated in a vibrant mixture of garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, and fresh herbs like parsley and oregano, then threaded onto skewers and grilled until pink and succulent.
preparationNotes: Quickly grilled shrimp with a potent garlic and herb marinade.
customerGuidance: Juicy and aromatic garlic and herb grilled shrimp skewers.

name: Grilled Halloumi & Vegetable Kebabs (Vegetarian)
description: Vegetarian skewers featuring cubes of salty halloumi cheese and a colorful array of seasonal vegetables like bell peppers, zucchini, cherry tomatoes, and red onion, grilled until the halloumi is golden and the vegetables are tender-crisp.
preparationNotes: Salty grilled halloumi paired with sweet, charred vegetables.
customerGuidance: A delicious vegetarian option: grilled halloumi and colorful vegetable kebabs.

name: Tofu Satay Skewers with peanut sauce (Vegan)
description: Firm tofu cubes marinated in a savory and aromatic satay-style blend (often including soy sauce, lime, ginger, garlic, turmeric, and coconut milk), then grilled or baked and served with a creamy peanut dipping sauce.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (if traditional soy sauce is used - tamari for GF)
preparationNotes: Flavorful grilled tofu with a rich and creamy peanut dipping sauce. Ensure tamari is used for gluten-free if needed.
customerGuidance: Deliciously savory and nutty vegan tofu satay skewers.

name: Mini Spanakopita (Spinach & Feta Puffs)
description: Bite-sized versions of the classic Greek savory pastry, featuring a rich filling of spinach, feta cheese, onions, and herbs, all encased in flaky phyllo dough.
preparationNotes: Small, savory pastries with a classic spinach and feta filling in crisp phyllo.
customerGuidance: Irresistible bite-sized spinach and feta puffs. (Nutritional info per piece)

name: Stuffed Grape Leaves (Dolmades)
description: Tender grape leaves wrapped around a savory filling, typically made with rice, fresh herbs like parsley, mint, and dill, onions, and sometimes pine nuts or ground meat. Served cold or warm, often with a lemon wedge or yogurt sauce.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_NUTS (pine nuts). Please inquire if nut-free is required.
preparationNotes: Classic Mediterranean delight of herbed rice wrapped in tender grape leaves. Assumed meatless (Yalantzi style).
customerGuidance: Flavorful and tender stuffed grape leaves. (Nutritional info per piece)

name: Saffron & Almond Rice Pilaf
description: An aromatic rice pilaf featuring long-grain rice cooked in broth with delicate saffron threads, toasted slivered almonds, and often other complementary spices or dried fruits.
allergenAlerts: Broth base determines if vegan (vegetable broth for vegan)
preparationNotes: Fragrant and colorful rice dish with the luxurious taste of saffron and crunch of almonds.
customerGuidance: Elegant saffron rice pilaf with toasted almonds.

name: Wild Rice Pilaf with Cranberries & Pecans
description: A flavorful and textural pilaf combining nutty wild rice with chewy dried cranberries, toasted pecans, and often aromatic vegetables like celery and onion, cooked in a savory broth.
allergenAlerts: Broth base determines if vegan (vegetable broth for vegan)
preparationNotes: A hearty and festive pilaf with a delightful mix of nutty, sweet, and savory flavors.
customerGuidance: Nutty wild rice pilaf with tart cranberries and crunchy pecans.

name: Patatas Bravas with Smoked Paprika Aioli
description: A classic Spanish tapa featuring crispy fried potato cubes served with a zesty, slightly spicy tomato-based 'bravas' sauce and a creamy, garlicky smoked paprika aioli.
preparationNotes: Crispy potatoes with two distinct sauces: a spicy tomato sauce and a creamy smoked paprika aioli.
customerGuidance: Irresistible Spanish crispy potatoes with spicy bravas sauce and smoky aioli.

name: Couscous Salad with Apricots, Almonds & Mint
description: A vibrant and flavorful Mediterranean-style salad featuring fluffy couscous tossed with sweet dried apricots, crunchy toasted almonds, fresh mint, and a light lemon-tahini or lemon-vinaigrette dressing.
preparationNotes: A refreshing and aromatic salad with a delightful combination of textures and flavors.
customerGuidance: Flavorful couscous salad with sweet apricots, crunchy almonds, and fresh mint.

name: Medley of Roasted Root Vegetables with herbs
description: A hearty and colorful mix of seasonal root vegetables like carrots, parsnips, sweet potatoes, and beets, roasted with olive oil and aromatic herbs until tender and caramelized.
preparationNotes: Naturally sweet and earthy root vegetables roasted to perfection with fragrant herbs.
customerGuidance: Hearty, healthy, and delicious roasted root vegetables.

name: Classic Greek Tzatziki (Cucumber Yogurt Dip)

name: Meat Cheese and Fruit Grazing Board
description: An abundant platter featuring a selection of cured meats, assorted cheeses, fresh seasonal fruits, and often crackers, nuts, and olives.
preparationNotes: A charcuterie-style board offering a variety of savory and sweet items. Gluten-free if served with GF crackers. Nut content varies.
suitableForDiets: KETO_FRIENDLY (with careful selection, without crackers/high-sugar fruits)
customerGuidance: A lavish spread of cured meats, cheeses, and fruits. Crackers may contain gluten; nuts may be present.

name: Fried Eggs
description: Eggs cooked by frying in oil or butter, typically served with a runny or set yolk based on preference (e.g., sunny-side up, over easy, over medium, over hard). Usually served as two eggs.
preparationNotes: Simple fried eggs. Dairy-free if cooked with oil instead of butter. Yolk preference can often be specified. Assumed 2 eggs per serving for nutrition.
customerGuidance: Classic fried eggs. Specify if you prefer oil over butter for dairy-free. (Nutrition for 2 eggs)

name: Egg Whites, scrambled
description: Scrambled egg whites, a lighter alternative to whole egg scrambles, cooked until fluffy.
allergenAlerts: MAY_CONTAIN_DAIRY (if cooked with butter or milk)
preparationNotes: A lean protein option. Dairy-free if cooked with oil and no milk added. Assumed equivalent of 3-4 egg whites for nutrition.
customerGuidance: Light and fluffy scrambled egg whites, a great source of lean protein.

name: Sausage Patties
description: Savory seasoned ground meat (typically pork) formed into round patties and cooked until browned and cooked through. Usually served as two patties.
preparationNotes: Classic breakfast sausage patties. Check for gluten content if sensitive, as some brands use fillers. Assumed 2 patties for nutrition.
customerGuidance: Flavorful pork sausage patties, a breakfast favorite. (Nutrition for 2 patties)

name: Turkey Bacon
description: A leaner alternative to traditional pork bacon, made from cured, smoked, and sliced turkey meat.
preparationNotes: Typically pan-fried or baked until crispy. Often contains nitrites. Assumed 2-3 slices for nutrition.
customerGuidance: A leaner bacon alternative made from turkey. (Nutrition for 2-3 slices)

name: Vegan Bacon
description: A plant-based alternative to traditional bacon, designed to mimic its smoky flavor and crispy texture.
preparationNotes: Plant-based bacon alternative. Check ingredients for specific allergens. Assumed 2-3 strips for nutrition.
customerGuidance: A smoky and savory plant-based bacon alternative. (Nutrition for 2-3 strips, varies by type)

name: Toast - Sourdough
description: Toasted slices of sourdough bread, known for its tangy flavor and chewy texture. Typically served with butter or jam on the side.
preparationNotes: Sourdough bread is typically vegan. Served plain or with optional butter/jam (butter is not vegan/dairy-free). Nutrition for 2 slices, plain.
customerGuidance: Tangy sourdough toast. (Nutrition for 2 slices, plain)

name: Toast - White
description: Toasted slices of classic white bread. Typically served with butter or jam on the side.
preparationNotes: Classic white toast. Vegan/dairy-free status depends on bread ingredients. Served plain or with optional butter/jam. Nutrition for 2 slices, plain.
customerGuidance: Simple white toast. (Nutrition for 2 slices, plain)

name: Toast - Whole Wheat
description: Toasted slices of whole wheat bread, offering more fiber than white bread. Typically served with butter or jam on the side.
preparationNotes: Wholesome whole wheat toast. Vegan/dairy-free status depends on bread ingredients (check for honey/dairy). Nutrition for 2 slices, plain.
customerGuidance: Nutritious whole wheat toast. (Nutrition for 2 slices, plain)

name: English Muffins
description: Small, round, yeast-leavened bread, typically split horizontally, toasted, and served with butter and/or jam.
preparationNotes: Classic toasted English muffins. Vegan/dairy-free status depends on brand ingredients. Nutrition per muffin, plain.
customerGuidance: Toasted English muffin, perfect for breakfast sandwiches or with spreads. (Nutrition per muffin, plain)

name: Biscuits
description: Soft, leavened quick bread, typically with a fluffy interior and a slightly crisp exterior. Often served with butter, jam, or gravy.
preparationNotes: Traditional breakfast biscuits, typically made with dairy. Nutrition per biscuit, plain.
customerGuidance: Warm, fluffy breakfast biscuits. (Nutrition per biscuit, plain)

name: Pancakes (with syrups)
description: Fluffy, griddled cakes made from batter, typically served in a stack with butter and assorted syrups.
preparationNotes: Classic American pancakes. Nutrition for a serving of 2-3 medium pancakes with syrup.
customerGuidance: A stack of fluffy pancakes served with your choice of syrup.

name: Waffles (with syrups)
description: Crisp and tender waffles made from batter cooked in a waffle iron, typically served with butter and assorted syrups.
preparationNotes: Classic breakfast waffles. Nutrition for one large waffle with syrup.
customerGuidance: Crispy golden waffles served with your choice of syrup.

name: French toast (with syrups)
description: Slices of bread soaked in an egg and milk mixture, then pan-fried until golden brown. Served with butter and assorted syrups, often dusted with powdered sugar.
preparationNotes: Classic eggy French toast. Nutrition for 2 slices with syrup.
customerGuidance: Rich and delicious French toast, served with syrup.

name: Bread pudding
description: A baked dessert or sweet breakfast dish made with bread, milk or cream, eggs, sugar, and often spices like cinnamon and nutmeg. May include raisins or other additions.
preparationNotes: A rich, custard-like bread-based dish. Often served warm. May contain nuts.
customerGuidance: Warm and comforting bread pudding, a sweet treat. (Nutrition per serving)

name: Cinnamon rolls
description: Sweet baked dough rolled with a cinnamon-sugar filling, often topped with a cream cheese or sugar glaze.
allergenAlerts: MAY_CONTAIN_NUTS (if nuts are added to filling/topping)
preparationNotes: Soft, sweet rolls with a prominent cinnamon flavor. Some recipes may include nuts like pecans.
customerGuidance: Warm, gooey cinnamon rolls with sweet glaze. (Nutrition per roll)

name: Hashbrowns
description: Potatoes that have been shredded or diced, then pan-fried until crispy and golden brown. Often seasoned with salt and pepper.
preparationNotes: Crispy fried potatoes. Vegan and dairy-free if prepared with oil instead of butter.
customerGuidance: Crispy shredded or diced hashbrown potatoes. (Nutrition per serving)

name: Home Fries
description: Diced or sliced potatoes, often parboiled then pan-fried with onions and sometimes bell peppers, until browned and tender.
preparationNotes: Hearty pan-fried potatoes with onions. Vegan and dairy-free if prepared with oil instead of butter.
customerGuidance: Savory home-fried potatoes, often with onions and peppers. (Nutrition per serving)

name: Grits
description: A porridge made from boiled cornmeal, typically ground hominy. Can be served savory (with butter, cheese, salt, pepper) or sweet.
dietaryFlags: VEGAN_OPTION (if made with water and no dairy additions)
allergenAlerts: MAY_CONTAIN_DAIRY (if made with milk or topped with butter/cheese)
preparationNotes: Southern-style corn porridge. Vegan and dairy-free if prepared with water and without dairy toppings.
customerGuidance: Creamy corn grits, a Southern classic. Can be customized savory or sweet. (Nutrition per serving, varies with additions)

name: Salami
description: A type of cured sausage, consisting of fermented and air-dried meat, typically pork or beef. Sliced for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Cured sausage with a rich, savory flavor. Most types are gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Savory sliced salami, great for adding depth to sandwiches. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

name: Oatmeal
description: A hot cereal made from oats (rolled, steel-cut, or instant), typically cooked with water or milk. Can be served plain or with various toppings.
dietaryFlags: VEGAN_OPTION (if made with water/plant milk and vegan toppings)
allergenAlerts: MAY_CONTAIN_DAIRY (if made with milk or dairy toppings)
MAY_CONTAIN_NUTS (if nuts are added as topping)
preparationNotes: Warm and hearty oatmeal. Gluten-free if made with certified GF oats. Vegan/dairy-free if made with water or plant-based milk and no dairy toppings. Nut-free if no nut toppings.
suitableForDiets: VEGETARIAN_DIET (check oats for GF certification if needed)
customerGuidance: Comforting oatmeal, customizable with toppings. (Nutrition per serving, varies with additions)

name: Smoked Turkey
description: Sliced smoked turkey breast, a popular lean deli meat choice for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Commonly used as a cold cut in sandwiches. Most brands are gluten-free, but it's good to verify for additives.
customerGuidance: Lean sliced smoked turkey, a classic sandwich choice. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

name: Black Forest Ham
description: A type of dry-cured smoked ham, known for its distinctive dark exterior and rich flavor, typically sliced for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Flavorful cured ham, usually gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Richly flavored Black Forest ham slices. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

name: Pepperoni
description: An American variety of salami, usually made from cured pork and beef, seasoned with paprika or other chili pepper. Sliced for sandwiches or as a pizza topping.
preparationNotes: Spicy cured sausage, typically gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Spicy pepperoni slices, adding a kick to your sandwich. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

name: Corned Beef
description: Beef brisket that has been salt-cured. Often sliced for sandwiches like the Reuben.
preparationNotes: Salt-cured beef brisket, a deli classic. Typically gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Tender sliced corned beef, perfect for a hearty sandwich. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

name: Roast Beef
description: Beef that has been roasted and then typically sliced thinly for sandwiches. Can be served warm or cold.
preparationNotes: Classic sliced roast beef. Naturally gluten-free when simply prepared.
customerGuidance: Flavorful sliced roast beef, a deli staple. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

name: Pastrami
description: A popular delicatessen meat, typically made from beef brisket that is brined, partially dried, seasoned with herbs and spices, then smoked and steamed. Sliced for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Highly seasoned smoked beef, a deli favorite. Typically gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Peppery and flavorful sliced pastrami. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

name: Cheddar Cheese
description: A relatively hard, off-white (or orange if colorings are added) natural cheese. Available in various sharpness levels, commonly sliced for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Popular cheese choice, naturally gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Classic cheddar cheese slices. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

name: Swiss Cheese
description: A mild cheese known for its characteristic holes (eyes), firm texture, and nutty, slightly sweet flavor. Commonly sliced for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Distinctive holey cheese, naturally gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Mild and nutty Swiss cheese slices. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

name: Monterey Cheese
description: An American semi-hard cheese, typically white, with a mild flavor and good melting properties. Often Monterey Jack. Sliced for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Mild, creamy cheese (often Monterey Jack), naturally gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Smooth Monterey Jack cheese slices. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

name: Gouda
description: A Dutch semi-hard cheese, typically yellow, known for its rich, unique flavor and smooth texture. Can be young (mild) or aged (sharper). Sliced for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Smooth, flavorful cheese, naturally gluten-free. Smoked Gouda is also common.
customerGuidance: Rich and creamy Gouda cheese slices. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

name: Cream Cheese
description: A soft, mild-tasting fresh cheese made from milk and cream. Often used as a spread on bagels and sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Soft, spreadable cheese. Naturally gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Creamy and smooth cream cheese spread. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

name: Havarti
description: A Danish semi-soft cheese with a buttery aroma and taste. It is typically rindless, with a smooth surface. Sliced for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Creamy, buttery cheese, naturally gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Smooth and mild Havarti cheese slices. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

name: Brie
description: A soft, creamy, pale-colored cheese with a white, edible rind, originating from France. Has a rich, buttery flavor.
preparationNotes: Soft-ripened cheese with an edible rind. Naturally gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Luxuriously creamy Brie cheese. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

name: Lettuce
description: Fresh lettuce leaves (e.g., romaine, iceberg, green leaf) used as a common sandwich filling for crispness and texture.
preparationNotes: Crisp lettuce leaves. Type of lettuce may vary.
customerGuidance: Fresh, crisp lettuce for your sandwich. (Nutrition per 1/2 cup shredded or 2-3 leaves)

name: Tomato
description: Slices of fresh, ripe tomato, adding moisture and a slightly acidic flavor to sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Juicy tomato slices.
customerGuidance: Fresh tomato slices. (Nutrition per 2 medium slices)

name: Onion
description: Thinly sliced raw onion (typically red or white), adding a pungent and sharp flavor to sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Raw onion slices, adds a sharp bite.
customerGuidance: Crisp onion slices. (Nutrition per few thin slices / 10g)

name: Avocado
description: Slices or mashed fresh avocado, providing a creamy texture and rich, buttery flavor to sandwiches. A source of healthy fats.
preparationNotes: Creamy fresh avocado.
customerGuidance: Fresh avocado slices or spread. (Nutrition per 1/4 medium avocado / ~30g)

name: Spinach
description: Fresh baby spinach leaves, a nutrient-dense addition to sandwiches, offering a mild flavor.
preparationNotes: Tender baby spinach leaves.
customerGuidance: Fresh spinach leaves. (Nutrition per 1/2 cup)

name: Alfafa
description: Alfalfa sprouts, offering a mild, slightly nutty flavor and a delicate, crunchy texture to sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Delicate alfalfa sprouts. Handle and consume with awareness of food safety guidelines for sprouts.
customerGuidance: Crisp alfalfa sprouts. (Nutrition per 1/4 cup)

name: Bell peppers
description: Slices of fresh bell peppers (various colors like green, red, yellow, orange), providing a sweet, crunchy texture to sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Sweet and crunchy bell pepper slices.
customerGuidance: Colorful bell pepper slices. (Nutrition per few slices / 1/4 cup)

name: White Bread
description: Classic sliced white bread, typically soft and mild in flavor, commonly used for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Standard white sandwich bread. Vegan/dairy-free status varies by brand.
customerGuidance: Soft white bread slices. (Nutrition per 2 slices)

name: Whole Wheat Bread
description: Sliced whole wheat bread, offering a heartier texture and more fiber than white bread.
preparationNotes: Whole wheat sandwich bread. Vegan/dairy-free status depends on brand (check for honey/dairy).
customerGuidance: Hearty whole wheat bread slices. (Nutrition per 2 slices)

name: Multigrain Bread
description: Sliced bread made with multiple types of grains, such as wheat, oats, barley, and rye, often with added seeds.
preparationNotes: Textured multigrain bread. Vegan/dairy-free status and specific allergens depend on brand.
customerGuidance: Flavorful multigrain bread slices with varied textures. (Nutrition per 2 slices)

name: Sourdough
description: Sliced sourdough bread, known for its characteristic tangy flavor, chewy texture, and open crumb. Used for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Tangy and chewy sourdough bread, excellent for sandwiches.
customerGuidance: Artisan-style sourdough bread slices. (Nutrition per 2 slices)

name: Rye
description: Sliced rye bread, made with rye flour, often having a distinctive earthy flavor and dense texture. Can be light or dark.
preparationNotes: Flavorful rye bread. Vegan/dairy-free status depends on specific recipe.
customerGuidance: Distinctive rye bread slices, often with caraway. (Nutrition per 2 slices)

name: Croissants
description: Buttery, flaky, viennoiserie pastry, often used as a base for sandwiches for a rich and tender bite.
preparationNotes: Classic buttery croissants, used for an indulgent sandwich.
customerGuidance: Flaky, buttery croissants for a special sandwich. (Nutrition per medium croissant)

name: Bagels
description: Ring-shaped bread roll, traditionally boiled and then baked, resulting in a dense, chewy interior and sometimes a crisp exterior. Various flavors available (plain, sesame, everything, etc.).
preparationNotes: Chewy bagels, offered in various flavors. Vegan/dairy-free status depends on specific recipe/brand.
customerGuidance: Assorted bagels, perfect for toasting and sandwiches. (Nutrition per average plain bagel)

name: Rolls
description: A variety of bread rolls suitable for sandwiches, such as hoagie rolls, kaiser rolls, or other soft or crusty individual rolls.
preparationNotes: Assorted sandwich rolls. Specific allergens and vegan status depend on the type of roll.
customerGuidance: A selection of rolls for building your sandwich. (Nutrition per average roll)

name: Gluten-Free Buns
description: Sandwich buns made from gluten-free flours and starches, suitable for individuals avoiding gluten.
preparationNotes: Specialty gluten-free buns. Vegan, dairy-free, and nut-free status depends heavily on the specific brand and formulation.
customerGuidance: Gluten-free buns available for your sandwich. (Nutrition per bun, may vary by brand)

name: Gluten-Free Bread slices
description: Sliced bread made from gluten-free flours and starches, suitable for individuals avoiding gluten.
preparationNotes: Specialty gluten-free bread slices. Vegan, dairy-free, and nut-free status depends heavily on the specific brand and formulation.
customerGuidance: Gluten-free bread slices available. (Nutrition per 2 slices, may vary by brand)

name: Classic Mayo
description: A creamy, traditional mayonnaise made primarily from oil, egg yolk, and an acid like vinegar or lemon juice.
preparationNotes: Standard mayonnaise. Typically gluten and dairy-free, but verify specific brand. Nutrition per 1 tbsp (approx 15g).
customerGuidance: Classic creamy mayonnaise.

name: Vegan Mayo
description: A plant-based mayonnaise alternative, designed to mimic the creaminess and taste of traditional mayo without using eggs or other animal products.
allergenAlerts: MAY_CONTAIN_SOY (if soybean oil or soy protein used)
preparationNotes: Egg-free and dairy-free mayonnaise. Typically gluten-free. Nutrition per 1 tbsp (approx 15g).
customerGuidance: Creamy plant-based vegan mayonnaise.

name: Cranberry Mayo
description: Mayonnaise blended with cranberries (often cranberry sauce or relish) for a sweet and tangy flavor, popular for turkey or chicken sandwiches.
preparationNotes: A sweet and savory mayonnaise. Nutrition per 1 tbsp (approx 15g).
customerGuidance: Sweet and tangy cranberry-infused mayonnaise.

name: Vegan Cilantro jalapeño aioli
description: A creamy, spicy, and zesty plant-based aioli flavored with fresh cilantro and jalapeño peppers.
preparationNotes: A flavorful and spicy vegan aioli. Nutrition per 1 tbsp (approx 15g).
customerGuidance: Spicy and zesty vegan cilantro jalapeño aioli.

name: Citrus Aioli
description: A creamy aioli (garlic mayonnaise) brightened with citrus zest and juice, such as lemon or orange.
preparationNotes: Garlic mayonnaise with a refreshing citrus twist. Nutrition per 1 tbsp (approx 15g).
customerGuidance: Bright and zesty citrus-infused aioli.

name: Basil Aioli
description: A creamy aioli (garlic mayonnaise) infused with the fresh, aromatic flavor of basil.
preparationNotes: Garlic mayonnaise with a fresh basil flavor. Nutrition per 1 tbsp (approx 15g).
customerGuidance: Aromatic aioli with fresh basil.

name: Horseradish Aioli
description: A creamy aioli (garlic mayonnaise) with the pungent, spicy kick of prepared horseradish.
preparationNotes: Spicy and creamy aioli. Check horseradish for sulphites if sensitive. Nutrition per 1 tbsp (approx 15g).
customerGuidance: Zesty aioli with a horseradish kick.

name: Classic Sweet Pickle Relish
description: A condiment made from finely chopped pickled cucumbers, sweetened and often flavored with spices.
preparationNotes: Sweet and tangy chopped pickle condiment. Nutrition per 1 tbsp (approx 15g).
customerGuidance: Classic sweet pickle relish.

name: Balsamic Fig Relish
description: A rich, sweet, and tangy relish made with figs, balsamic vinegar, and often onions or shallots and spices.
preparationNotes: Gourmet sweet and savory relish. Vegan if honey is not used. Nutrition per 1 tbsp (approx 15g).
customerGuidance: Rich balsamic fig relish, a sophisticated topping.

name: Avocado Cilantro & Lime Spread
description: A creamy and zesty spread made from mashed avocados, fresh cilantro, lime juice, and seasonings.
preparationNotes: Similar to guacamole but often smoother for spreading. Nutrition per 2 tbsp (approx 30g).
customerGuidance: Fresh and zesty avocado, cilantro, and lime spread.

name: Eggplant & Tahini Spread
description: A smooth and smoky spread made from roasted or grilled eggplant, tahini (sesame paste), lemon juice, and garlic. Commonly known as Baba Ghanoush.
preparationNotes: Smoky and creamy Middle Eastern spread. Nutrition per 2 tbsp (approx 30g).
customerGuidance: Smoky eggplant and tahini spread (Baba Ghanoush).

name: Pomegranate / pepper / walnut spread
description: A rich and flavorful Middle Eastern dip or spread (Muhammara) made from roasted red peppers, walnuts, pomegranate molasses, and traditionally breadcrumbs.
preparationNotes: Sweet, tangy, and nutty spread. Gluten-free if breadcrumbs are omitted or GF version used. Nutrition per 2 tbsp (approx 30g).
customerGuidance: Delicious roasted red pepper and walnut spread (Muhammara).

name: Lebanese garlic Spread (very garlicky)
description: Toum - a bold and creamy Lebanese garlic sauce or spread, made with fresh garlic, oil, lemon juice, and salt, emulsified to a fluffy, pungent texture.
preparationNotes: Intensely garlicky and fluffy spread. A little goes a long way. Nutrition per 1 tbsp (approx 15g).
customerGuidance: Potent Lebanese garlic spread (Toum) - very garlicky!

name: Kale Salad
description: A salad featuring fresh kale as the primary green, often massaged or finely chopped, and typically tossed with a complementary dressing and various toppings.
preparationNotes: Highly customizable salad. Allergens and dietary suitability depend heavily on selected dressing and toppings.
customerGuidance: Nutrient-packed kale salad. Inquire about ingredients for specific dietary needs.

name: Greek Village Salad
description: A traditional Greek salad (Horiatiki) made with tomatoes, cucumbers, red onions, Kalamata olives, and feta cheese, typically dressed with olive oil and oregano. Does not usually contain lettuce.
preparationNotes: A refreshing, lettuce-free salad with classic Greek flavors.
customerGuidance: Authentic Greek village salad with tomatoes, cucumbers, olives, and feta.

name: Italian Pasta Salad
description: A cold pasta salad with Italian-inspired ingredients, such as rotini or penne pasta, cherry tomatoes, mozzarella balls, olives, salami or pepperoni, and an Italian vinaigrette.
preparationNotes: A hearty pasta salad. Can be vegetarian if meat is omitted. Not vegan due to cheese.
customerGuidance: Flavorful Italian pasta salad with fresh veggies and mozzarella.

name: Tabouli Salad
description: A Middle Eastern vegetarian salad made primarily of finely chopped parsley, with tomatoes, mint, onion, bulgur (cracked wheat), and seasoned with olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
preparationNotes: A refreshing herb and grain salad. Quinoa can be substituted for bulgur for a GF version, but this is traditional Tabouli.
customerGuidance: Refreshing parsley and bulgur wheat salad with lemon and mint.

name: German Cucumber Salad
description: A traditional German salad (Gurkensalat) featuring thinly sliced cucumbers in a creamy dill dressing or a tangy vinegar-based dressing.
allergenAlerts: MAY_CONTAIN_DAIRY (if creamy version with sour cream/yogurt)
preparationNotes: Cool and refreshing cucumber salad. Can be creamy (dairy) or vinegar-based (vegan/dairy-free).
customerGuidance: Refreshing German cucumber salad, specify creamy or vinegar style if option exists.

name: Classic Potato Salad
description: A traditional cold salad made from boiled potatoes, typically mixed with mayonnaise, mustard, hard-boiled eggs, celery, and onion.
preparationNotes: Creamy and satisfying potato salad. Typically gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Classic creamy American potato salad.

name: Tossed Cobb
description: A hearty American garden salad, typically made with chopped salad greens, tomato, crispy bacon, grilled or roasted chicken breast, hard-boiled eggs, avocado, chives, Roquefort cheese, and a vinaigrette dressing.
preparationNotes: A substantial salad that can serve as a main course.
customerGuidance: A classic American Cobb salad, loaded with toppings.

name: Crunchy Asian Salad
description: A vibrant salad with Asian-inspired flavors, typically featuring shredded cabbage or mixed greens, carrots, edamame, mandarin oranges, crispy wonton strips or chow mein noodles, and a sesame ginger or peanut dressing.
preparationNotes: Flavorful and textural salad. Vegan if dressing is honey-free. Gluten-free if crispy topping is omitted or GF.
customerGuidance: A vibrant and crunchy Asian-inspired salad.

name: Caesar Salad
description: A green salad of romaine lettuce and croutons dressed with lemon juice (or lime juice), olive oil, egg, Worcestershire sauce, anchovies, garlic, Dijon mustard, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper.
preparationNotes: Classic salad. Vegetarian/vegan versions require modified dressing (no egg/anchovy/dairy) and no cheese.
customerGuidance: The classic Caesar salad with romaine, croutons, and Parmesan.

name: Lebanese Bread Salad (Fattoush)
description: Fattoush is a Levantine bread salad made from toasted or fried pieces of khubz (Arabic flatbread) combined with mixed greens and other vegetables, such as radishes, tomatoes, and cucumbers, dressed with a tangy sumac vinaigrette.
preparationNotes: A zesty and crunchy salad with pieces of toasted/fried bread.
customerGuidance: Refreshing Lebanese Fattoush salad with crispy pita bread and sumac dressing.
